top_companies.summary: AI First. If you didn't start reading this ad already thinking about how you'd automate it — this role probably isn't for you. But if you live and breathe AI, keep reading. We're SnappyVAS (snappyvas.com) — an AI-first company and a no-code platform for...
top_companies.full_description: AI First. If you didn't start reading this ad already thinking about how you'd automate it — this role probably isn't for you. But if you live and breathe AI, keep reading. We're SnappyVAS (snappyvas.com) — an AI-first company and a no-code platform for building and deploying AI agents: chat widgets, landing pages, bookings, lead qualification, and multi-channel deploy to Slack, WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, and Lark. We practice what we preach: we run our own operations on AI, and we're hiring a right-hand VA who does the same. This is NOT a traditional back-office VA job. We don't want someone who waits for instructions and copies data between spreadsheets. This is a growth-and-promotion role. You'll work directly with the SnappyVAS directors, you'll work ON the platform every day — using it, testing new features, and promoting it — and you'll go find businesses that need us and help bring them in. We want someone smart and hungry — a builder obsessed with productivity, automation, and finding smarter ways to work using AI every single day. If you're the kind of person who teaches yourself new tools on the weekend, gets a kick out of automating things away, and loves the hustle of putting a product in front of the right people, you'll fit right in. The AI tools you must know (in order of importance) Claude Code / Cowork — this is essential and non-negotiable Lovable ChatGPT Perplexity If you're constantly building, researching, automating, promoting, and solving problems with these tools, we want to hear from you. What you'll do Support the directors — act as a right hand to the SnappyVAS founders, handling research, communications, follow-ups, and whatever moves the business forward Work ON the platform — use SnappyVAS daily, build and test agents, stress-test new features, and report back what's great and what needs fixing Market and promote SnappyVAS — create content, outreach, and campaigns that get the platform in front of the businesses who need it Business development & lead generation — research and find prospects (trades, local service businesses, restaurants, creators, and small businesses), build target lists, and help bring them in as customers Automate the growth engine — build AI-driven workflows in Claude Code/Cowork for prospecting, outreach, and reporting; find repetitive work and automate it away Build with Lovable — help ship landing pages, demos, and internal tools Write advanced prompts that produce high-quality, reliable results Research and test new AI tools, then put the best ones to work Create SOPs, documentation, and reports that keep the operation sharp What you need Extensive hands-on experience with Claude Code/Cowork (required), Lovable, ChatGPT, and Perplexity Excellent prompt engineering skills Strong research and lead-generation instincts — you can find the right businesses and the right people to contact A promoter's mindset — comfortable with outreach, marketing, and putting a product in front of people Highly organised with exceptional attention to detail Self-motivated and proactive — a builder who finds solutions instead of waiting to be told Excellent written and spoken English Reliable internet connection and a proper home office setup Bonus points Automation tools: n8n, Make, or Zapier Basic coding or API knowledge Experience in sales, outreach, marketing, or social media Experience supporting business owners, founders, or executives What we offer Fully remote, work-from-home A front-row seat with the founders and real influence over how we grow Long-term opportunity with real career growth An AI-first company that adopts the latest tech constantly Exciting work across many industries as we bring new businesses onto the platform How to Apply To apply, please send: Your resume A short video introducing yourself A summary of your experience with Claude Code/Cowork, Lovable, ChatGPT, and Perplexity Examples of AI workflows, prompts, or projects you've built Which AI tool you use the most, and why Application Test (read carefully) Start your application with the words "AI First" and tell us about the most impressive thing you've built or automated using Claude Code/Cowork. Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered. Shortlisted applicants will be invited to complete a short online skills exam. Note: the exam must be completed on your own — using AI to answer the questions will disqualify you (more on that when you're invited). Study snappyvas.com for platform questionsRewrite job ad for onlinejobs.phDesign 20-question screening exam + prerequisitesBuild screening app live in Lovable5Adding auto-email of resultsSnappyVAS_OnlineJobsPH_Ad.mdSnappyVAS_Screening_Exam.mdTrack tools and referenced files used in this task.

top_companies.summary: GoHighLevel Specialist + Website+Video & Social Media Creator Remote · Full-Time · US Eye-Care Medical Group (Florida) Base $700–$1,100 USD/month + uncapped new-patient bonuses that can DOUBLE your base. Read This First This is not a generic VA job. We are...
top_companies.full_description: GoHighLevel Specialist + Website+Video & Social Media Creator Remote · Full-Time · US Eye-Care Medical Group (Florida) Base $700–$1,100 USD/month + uncapped new-patient bonuses that can DOUBLE your base. Read This First This is not a generic VA job. We are hiring one exceptional person to run our marketing engine and grow it. We will train you, pay you on time, treat you like a teammate, and reward you directly every time your work brings in a new patient. The harder and smarter you work, the more you earn. Your base is just the floor. Your ceiling is set by you. If you are world-class at GoHighLevel AND can create scroll-stopping video and social content, keep reading. If you are a generalist who has “heard of” these tools, this is not your job — and that’s okay. The Offer (Why the Best Apply Here) Base salary $700 – $1,100 USD/month (full-time, 40 hrs/week) New-patient bonus $ USD for every qualifying new patient your work brings in (booked + shows up). No cap. Realistic earning Drive 35-50 new patients in a month and you will earn up to 50% of your base . The more you produce, the more you make — every month. Reviews Reviewed every 6 months. Strong performers reach the top of the base range within 90 days. 13th-month bonus Paid after 12 months. Paid time off Paid US holidays after probation + paid leave. Payment Bi-weekly via Wise — on time, every time. What the bonus means in plain numbers: $ per qualifying new patient, uncapped. A productive month can earn you more in bonuses than your entire base. We want you to out-earn the salary — that means we’re both winning. Schedule • 45-50 hrs/week (we may start you at 20–30 hrs/week part-time, with a clear, fast path to full-time). • Live overlap required: 9:00 AM – 200 PM US Eastern (9:00 PM – 1:00 AM Manila), Monday–Friday, for real-time work with the CEO and marketing lead. Some flexibility on exact hours. • The rest of your hours are flexible — we care about output, not clock-watching. About Us We are a US-based ophthalmology / eye-care medical group with three clinic locations in Florida. We treat thousands of patients every month, focused on senior eye health, diabetic eye disease, and advanced retinal care. We are stable, established, and real — not a fly-by-night agency. We have a small, dedicated in-house marketing team and an active marketing budget. You will work directly with the CEO and the marketing lead — no five layers of management between you and the people who make decisions and see your work. The Role — In One Sentence You will own our GoHighLevel (GHL) CRM end-to-end and produce the video and social content that brings senior and diabetic patients through our doors — then get paid a bonus on every patient you help bring in. What You'll Actually Do (Day-in-the-Life) — GoHighLevel Operations (the backbone) • Build and maintain workflows from scratch: patient recall, new-patient intake, no-show recovery, review requests, and our referral/ambassador program. • Manage and clean pipelines, opportunity stages, and contact tags. • Build SMS + email sequences (US-tone copy is supplied — you execute and polish, you don’t write from zero). • Set up and maintain calendar integrations and lead routing. • Build dashboards and weekly reports: leads in ? calls booked ? patients shown. • Connect GHL to forms, landing pages, and Meta lead forms. — Video & Social Media Creation (where you shine) • Create and edit scroll-stopping short-form video for YouTube, Instagram Reels, Facebook, and TikTok — content that actually gets seniors (65+) and diabetics to call us. • Run our organic social presence across all platforms, targeting patients within a 15–20 mile radius of each of our three offices. • Edit real footage of our doctors, staff, and (consented) patients into warm, trustworthy, human content. • Important: our audience is older adults and people managing a serious health condition. We use real people, real stories, and a caring tone — never AI avatars or AI voices. You’ll film, cut, caption, and publish content that feels like a trusted neighbor, not an ad. • Track what works (saves, shares, calls, DMs) and make more of it. — Paid Ads Support (Meta / Facebook) • Daily Ads Manager checks: spend, frequency, CPM, CTR, cost-per-lead. • Upload and launch creative; build and duplicate campaigns/ad sets. • Pull weekly performance reports. • You execute under direction — you are not the lead strategist — but you must know Meta Ads Manager cold, including the Special Ad Category (Health & Wellness) rules that apply to US healthcare advertisers. — Reporting + Documentation • Weekly Monday performance snapshot to the CEO. • Build and maintain an SOP document as you go, so the system never depends on one person. Must-Haves (Do Not Apply Without These) 1. 2+ years hands-on GoHighLevel — building workflows from scratch, not clicking templates. Be ready to show real workflows you’ve built. 2. Proven video editing + social content skills — short-form video for Reels / TikTok / YouTube. Be ready to show a portfolio or links to content you’ve made that performed. 3. Meta Ads and Google Manager experience — 1+ year managing live ad accounts. Bonus if you’ve worked under Meta’s Special Ad Category (Health & Wellness). 4. Excellent written and spoken English — you’ll write internal updates and US-facing SMS/email copy reviewed by the CEO. 5. Reliable internet (25 Mbps+), a quiet workspace, and a working webcam (weekly Zoom). 6. Long-term mindset — we’re hiring for years, not months. Job-hoppers will be cut early. Nice-to-Haves (Bonus Points) • US healthcare or medical-practice experience. • HIPAA awareness (we train, but knowing what patient data can’t touch is a plus). • Zapier / Make.com. • Canva / CapCut fluency for fast visual turnarounds. • Experience with patient recall, no-show recovery, or appointment-booking funnels. Who This Is Perfect For • You’ve run GHL for 2+ agencies and you’re tired of juggling 8 clients — you want one company, deep work, and real impact. • You can build systems and make a video that actually makes someone pick up the phone. • You’re motivated by results: you’d rather earn $ a patient with no cap than sit on a flat salary. • You want to grow into an Operations / Marketing Manager role within 12–18 months. • You want a US employer who pays on time, communicates clearly, and treats you like a teammate. Who This Is Not For • Generalist VAs who’ve only “heard of” GHL. • Agencies or teams reselling labor — we hire one human, directly. • Anyone unwilling to do a paid 2-hour test task before a final offer (you keep the pay even if not hired). How to Apply — Read Carefully (This Is Your First Test) We get hundreds of applications. This is how we filter for people who actually read and follow instructions. Subject line, exactly: CLEAR VISION — GHL + Video Specialist — [Your Name] In the body, include — in this order: 7. Codeword: “20/20” at the very top, so we know you read this. 8. 3 GoHighLevel workflows you personally built — 1–2 sentences each: the problem it solved and the result. 9. 2 video / social posts you created — links to the actual content, plus the result (views, saves, calls, leads). 10. 1 Meta Ads or Google campaign you ran — niche, monthly spend, what you optimized for, and the result. 11. Years of GHL experience + years of video/social experience + years of Meta Ads experience. 12. A Loom video (3 minutes max) walking through ONE workflow inside your own GHL account. Required — no Loom, no review. 13. Your full-time monthly rate in USD (and part-time hourly if relevant). 14. Earliest start date + how many hours of US Eastern overlap you can commit to. Applications missing any of the above are rejected automatically. Hiring Timeline • Applications reviewed daily. • Shortlist contacted within 5 business days. • Round 1: 30-min Zoom with the Marketing Lead. • Round 2: Paid 2-hour test task (you keep the pay even if not hired). • Final: 20-min call with the CEO. • Offer within 2 weeks of applying. Why You'll Want This Job • Stable US healthcare company — years in operation, not a startup that might vanish. • Real budget, real tools — you won’t be told to “make it work with free Mailchimp.” • Uncapped bonuses — your effort directly sets your income. Most months, your bonus can rival or beat your base. • Direct CEO access — your work is seen and rewarded. • Clear growth path — Operations / Marketing Manager role opening within 12–18 months for the right person. • One company, one mission, deep focus — no client-juggling. We are looking for one excellent person. Take the time to apply properly — and welcome to a role where the harder you work, the more you earn.

top_companies.summary: Senior Growth Marketing Manager (Google Ads, AI Creative & Demand Generation) About Cynergists AI Cynergists AI is building the future of business operations through an Agentic CRM, AI Agents, automation, voice, SMS, email, customer intelligence, and...
top_companies.full_description: Senior Growth Marketing Manager (Google Ads, AI Creative & Demand Generation) About Cynergists AI Cynergists AI is building the future of business operations through an Agentic CRM, AI Agents, automation, voice, SMS, email, customer intelligence, and marketing technology. We help businesses automate work, improve customer relationships, and scale growth. We are looking for a Growth Marketing Manager who can generate qualified leads, booked demos, partner growth, and customer acquisition through paid media, AI-powered creative, and performance marketing. What You'll Do Google Ads (Primary Focus) Own and optimize: Google Search Google Performance Max (P-Max) Google Demand Gen YouTube Ads Display Ads Retargeting Campaigns Responsibilities include: Campaign creation and management Keyword research Audience targeting Negative keyword management Budget allocation Bid strategy optimization Conversion tracking Landing page alignment Performance reporting Paid Media (Secondary Channels) Manage and optimize campaigns across: Meta Ads LinkedIn Ads TikTok Ads Retargeting Platforms AI Creative & Prompt Engineering (Core Requirement) Use AI daily to create and test marketing assets. Create: Ad images Social graphics Display ads YouTube thumbnails Landing page visuals Short-form videos YouTube video ads AI spokesperson videos Product demos Recruiting campaigns Must be highly skilled at prompting AI tools to generate high-converting marketing creative. top_companies.full_description: HubSpot CMS & UX/UI Web Developer Location: Remote Employment Type: Full-Time Contract Work Schedule: Must be available to work during Pacific Standard Time business hours Compensation: $8–$12 per hour USD, depending on experience and skill set About Set 2 Close Set 2 Close is a revenue operations and enablement agency that helps businesses optimize their marketing, sales, and customer success systems for predictable growth. We bridge the gap between strategy, technology, and execution by helping clients build better systems, improve workflows, and create scalable digital experiences. We are looking for a HubSpot CMS & UX/UI Web Developer to join our team. This role is ideal for someone who combines strong front-end development skills with a sharp eye for user experience and visual design. The right candidate will be comfortable working directly with clients to design, build, and optimize web pages inside HubSpot CMS / Content Hub. Role Overview The HubSpot CMS & UX/UI Web Developer will be responsible for creating responsive, user-friendly, and visually polished web pages using HubSpot CMS. This person should be well-versed in HubSpot’s CMS capabilities, including website building, templates, modules, HubDB, integrations, and front-end customization. This role is primarily focused on HubSpot CMS web design and development, but experience with HubSpot reporting, analytics, pipelines, marketing campaigns, and general HubSpot administration will be valuable. We are looking for someone who can take client requirements, translate them into strong UX/UI designs, and then build functional, scalable web pages within HubSpot. * Key Responsibilities HubSpot CMS Web Design & Development Design, build, and maintain responsive web pages using HubSpot CMS / Content Hub. Develop and customize HubSpot templates, themes, modules, landing pages, and website pages. Use HTML, CSS, HubL, and basic JavaScript to create clean, scalable, and functional front-end experiences. Build modular page designs that are easy for clients and internal teams to update. Work with HubDB to create dynamic content and database-driven web pages. Support the setup and customization of HubSpot CMS assets, including forms, CTAs, menus, blog templates, and global content. Ensure websites and landing pages are optimized for desktop, tablet, and mobile experiences. * UX/UI Design Create clean, intuitive, and visually appealing user interfaces. Translate client brand guidelines, marketing goals, and business requirements into strong web experiences. Apply UX/UI best practices to improve usability, navigation, page flow, and conversion performance. Design wireframes, mockups, or page layouts when needed before development. Balance design aesthetics with practical, functional, and scalable implementation inside HubSpot. * Client-Facing Collaboration Work directly with clients to understand their website needs, page requirements, branding, and desired user experience. Communicate technical and design decisions clearly to both clients and internal teams. Collaborate with marketing strategists, RevOps specialists, developers, and project managers to deliver high-quality HubSpot CMS projects. Gather feedback, make revisions, and ensure final web pages align with client expectations. * HubSpot Marketing & CRM Support Assist with building and supporting HubSpot marketing campaigns. Help create and optimize landing pages, forms, workflows, email assets, and campaign-related web pages. Support basic HubSpot reporting and analytics setup. Assist with HubSpot pipeline setup, basic CRM configuration, and marketing/sales process support when needed. Use HubSpot reporting tools to help clients understand website performance, campaign results, and conversion activity. * Testing, Optimization & Maintenance Test pages across browsers, devices, and screen sizes. Troubleshoot layout, styling, responsiveness, and CMS-related issues. Optimize pages for speed, SEO, accessibility, and conversion best practices. Maintain clean, organized, and reusable front-end code. Identify opportunities to improve existing HubSpot CMS pages, templates, and user experiences. * Required Skills & Qualifications Proven experience designing and developing websites inside HubSpot CMS / Content Hub. Strong front-end development skills, especially in HTML, CSS, and HubL. Working knowledge of JavaScript is preferred. Strong understanding of UX/UI design principles. Experience building responsive websites and landing pages. Experience working with HubSpot templates, modules, themes, and CMS page editing tools. Familiarity with HubDB and dynamic content inside HubSpot. Ability to build visually appealing designs and translate them into functional web pages. Strong communication skills and ability to work directly with clients. Ability to collaborate with marketing, sales, and technical teams. Understanding of SEO, accessibility, website speed, and conversion best practices. Ability to work during Pacific Standard Time business hours. A portfolio showcasing HubSpot CMS, UX/UI, web design, or front-end development work is required. * Nice-to-Have Skills Experience with HubSpot Content Hub Remix. Experience creating custom HubSpot themes and reusable modules. Experience with HubSpot marketing tools, email campaigns, workflows, forms, and CTAs. Experience setting up HubSpot dashboards, reports, and basic analytics. Experience building or supporting HubSpot pipelines. Basic understanding of RevOps, CRM systems, lead generation, and marketing automation. Experience using design tools such as Figma, Adobe XD, Canva, or similar platforms. Experience working in an agency or client-facing environment. * Ideal Candidate Profile The ideal candidate is a hybrid designer and developer who understands both how a website should look and how it should function. You are creative, detail-oriented, and technically capable. You can work with a client to understand their vision, design a strong user experience, and build it inside HubSpot CMS. You should be comfortable taking ownership of HubSpot CMS projects, from page layout and UX/UI design to front-end implementation and troubleshooting. You enjoy creating web pages that are not only visually strong but also functional, responsive, and easy to manage. This role is best suited for someone who can communicate clearly, work independently, collaborate with internal teams, and deliver high-quality HubSpot CMS experiences for clients. * Compensation & Benefits $8–$12 per hour USD, based on experience and skill set. Remote work setup. Opportunity to work with a fast-growing revenue operations and enablement agency. Exposure to HubSpot CMS, RevOps, marketing automation, CRM, and client-facing digital projects. Collaborative environment with opportunities to grow technical, creative, and strategic skills. How to Apply Interested applicants should send the following: Resume Portfolio showcasing HubSpot CMS, UX/UI, web design, or front-end development work A short note explaining why they are a strong fit for this HubSpot CMS and UX/UI web development role Send applications to: ---------- Subject line: HubSpot CMS & UX/UI Web Developer Application – [Your Name]

top_companies.summary: **About the role** I run a fast-growing AI consulting business serving high-profile entrepreneurs in the German-speaking market. We help them work with Claude (Cowork) and we build the setups and skills that run their business. We already run client Claude...
top_companies.full_description: **About the role** I run a fast-growing AI consulting business serving high-profile entrepreneurs in the German-speaking market. We help them work with Claude (Cowork) and we build the setups and skills that run their business. We already run client Claude setups, email systems on client servers, dashboards, and sales workflows live. I have more client projects and more ideas than the team can execute, so I'm bringing on one more builder. This is not heavy coding. It is knowing how to use Claude and Claude Code the right way: building skills cleanly, testing properly, and shipping things that actually work. **Who you'll work with** You won't be alone. You'll join a small, tight team and work directly with me and another developer. Clear structures, clear briefings, daily contact. Lots of guidance early, more freedom as trust grows. **What you will do** - Build and test Claude skills (for clients using Claude Cowork and for internal use) - Set up and run client systems on their VPS servers (email: classify and structure mail, auto-draft replies, pre-filtering, black- and whitelists by sender and topic) - Build dashboards and controlling from Excel exports (turning platform exports into clean revenue and commission numbers) - Content and design skills, reusable templates (keynotes, presentations) - Proposal and invoice workflows - Lead scraping and enrichment, end-to-end sales workflows - Build custom MCPs that connect a client's Claude Cowork setup to their VPS - Turn finished projects into reusable templates we deploy across many clients Most client projects are not advanced. The work is simple but takes time, and it has to be done carefully and correctly. **What matters most to me** Two things above everything: honesty and reliability. When you tell me a skill or a system is done and working, I need to fully trust that. I do not want to re-check your work. "Done" has to mean done and tested. My clients are in the German-speaking market, so data protection (GDPR) and security are always at the highest level. Precise, careful, conscientious work is the foundation. **Must-have** - Hands-on experience with Claude / Claude Code (Cowork): able to build, test and ship skills - VPS / server skills: comfortable setting up and running systems on a Linux server - Strategic thinking: if I send you a discovery-call transcript, you can suggest how you would build it and why - Follows instructions precisely and works in a structured way - Honest and reliable - Detail-oriented and careful (data protection and security) - Good written English **What I offer** - Long-term, full-time collaboration, not short project hopping - A growing company with high-profile clients and a real team around you - Clear structures, clear organization, very clear instructions - A performance culture: I do not care how long you take or how you got there, I care about the result. Strong, fast, high-quality work is rewarded with raises, quickly **Hours** We work on Gulf Standard Time (Dubai, GMT+4). Team hours are 10 AM to 6 PM Dubai time, which is 2 PM to 10 PM your time in the Philippines. We have a short daily check-in call, and I want a short written end-of-day report every day. **Compensation** Starting salary $800 USD/month. We start lean. Performance is rewarded fast: above-average work means steady raises and growing income over time. The person we hired last round is already on this path. **Who should not apply** Please don't apply if you're a general virtual assistant. We need a specialized Claude expert, not a VA. If your background is general IT support or make.com / n8n automation, this is not the right fit either. The projects you've built have to be built with Claude. We do NOT use n8n or make.com or zapier. **How to apply** Don't send me a portfolio or a long write-up. Just reply with one line: "I'm in". That's it. I answer everyone, and we take it from there together. Applications close **Tuesday, June 30, EOD**.

Lots of guidance early, more freedom as trust grows. **What you will do** - Build and test Claude skills (for clients using Claude Cowork and for internal use) - Set up and run client systems on their VPS servers (email: classify and structure mail, auto-draft replies, pre-filtering, black- and whitelists by sender and topic) - Build dashboards and controlling from Excel exports (turning platform exports into clean revenue and commission numbers) - Content and design skills, reusable templates (keynotes, presentations) - Proposal and invoice workflows - Lead scraping and enrichment, end-to-end sales workflows - Build custom MCPs that connect a client's Claude Cowork setup to their VPS - Turn finished projects into reusable templates we deploy across many clients Most client projects are not advanced. The work is simple but takes time, and it has to be done carefully and correctly. **What matters most to me** Two things above everything: honesty and reliability. When you tell me a skill or a system is done and working, I need to fully trust that. I do not want to re-check your work. "Done" has to mean done and tested. My clients are in the German-speaking market, so data protection (GDPR) and security are always at the highest level. Precise, careful, conscientious work is the foundation. **Must-have** - Hands-on experience with Claude / Claude Code (Cowork): able to build, test and ship skills - VPS / server skills: comfortable setting up and running systems on a Linux server - Strategic thinking: if I send you a discovery-call transcript, you can suggest how you would build it and why - Follows instructions precisely and works in a structured way - Honest and reliable - Detail-oriented and careful (data protection and security) - Good written English **What I offer** - Long-term, full-time collaboration, not short project hopping - A growing company with high-profile clients and a real team around you - Clear structures, clear organization, very clear instructions - A performance culture: I do not care how long you take or how you got there, I care about the result. Strong, fast, high-quality work is rewarded with raises, quickly **Hours** We work on Gulf Standard Time (Dubai, GMT+4). Team hours are 10 AM to 6 PM Dubai time, which is 2 PM to 10 PM your time in the Philippines. We have a short daily check-in call, and I want a short written end-of-day report every day. **Compensation** Starting salary $800 USD/month. We start lean. Performance is rewarded fast: above-average work means steady raises and growing income over time. The person we hired last round is already on this path. **Who should not apply** Please don't apply if you're a general virtual assistant. We need a specialized Claude expert, not a VA. If your background is general IT support or make.com / n8n automation, this is not the right fit either. The projects you've built have to be built with Claude. We do NOT use n8n or make.com or zapier. **How to apply** Don't send me a portfolio or a long write-up. Just reply with one line: "I'm in". That's it. I answer everyone, and we take it from there together. Applications close **Tuesday, June 30, EOD**.

Schedule Full-Time Monday through Friday 40 Hours Per Week Location Remote ? About SMB Solutions We are an AI automation and digital marketing company that helps businesses grow through AI, automation, SEO, social media, reputation management, and data intelligence. We are looking for a highly organized AI Research & Data Mining Specialist who enjoys finding information that other people cannot. This is not a simple virtual assistant position. You will use cutting-edge AI tools to uncover business opportunities, identify prospects, organize research, and help build intelligent databases for our sales and marketing teams. If you enjoy investigating, researching, organizing information, and using AI to work smarter, this could be the perfect long-term opportunity. ? Responsibilities AI Powered Research Use AI tools to perform deep internet research including: • Industry research • Company research • Market research • Competitor research • Geographic research • Local business research • Social media research • Public data research ? Data Mining Locate and organize information from multiple online sources. Examples include: • Business websites • Online directories • Google Maps • Social media platforms • Forums • Blogs • Public databases • Government websites • Industry associations • Review websites • Business listings ? Lead Intelligence Research and organize information such as: • Company names • Contact information • Decision makers • Industries • Geographic locations • Service areas • Company size • Technologies used • Social media presence • Online reputation • Website information ? Spreadsheet Organization Maintain clean and organized databases using: • Google Sheets • Microsoft Excel • Airtable • CSV files • CRM systems Accuracy and attention to detail are extremely important. ? AI Tools Experience with AI is highly preferred. Examples include: • Perplexity • Claude • ChatGPT • Manus • Gemini • Grok • ScrapeBox • Browse AI • Apify • Clay • Phantombuster • Bright Data • Any other AI research or automation platform If you’ve used different AI tools than those listed above, we’d love to hear about them. ? What You’ll Be Researching Examples include: • HVAC companies • Medical practices • Roofing companies • Law firms • Restaurants • Churches • Insurance agencies • Construction companies • Local businesses • Industry trends • Consumer discussions • Geographic markets • Online communities No two projects are exactly the same. ? Required Skills Excellent internet research skills Strong organizational skills Excellent attention to detail Excellent English Google Sheets proficiency Microsoft Excel proficiency Critical thinking Ability to verify information Ability to work independently Ability to meet deadlines ? Bonus Skills Experience with: AI prompting Prompt engineering Web scraping Data enrichment Automation CRM systems Lead generation Market research SEO research Competitive analysis ? What Success Looks Like The ideal candidate: • Loves solving research problems • Enjoys finding information others cannot • Uses AI to increase productivity • Is extremely organized • Documents everything clearly • Thinks independently • Produces accurate work • Continuously learns new AI tools ? Compensation $80 to $125 USD per week Based on experience and skill level. Weekly pay Full-Time Position Long-Term Opportunity Performance reviews with opportunities for increased compensation. ? How to Apply To show that you pay attention to detail, start your application with this exact sentence: “AI helps me research smarter, not harder.” Then include: 1. Your resume 2. Your internet speed 3. Every AI tool you currently use 4. Your favorite AI tool and why 5. Describe one difficult research project you’ve completed 6. Tell us how you would use AI to find roofing companies in Texas that recently experienced hail damage 7. Share one Google Sheet or Excel spreadsheet you’ve created (if available) Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.

top_companies.summary: We are hiring an assistant with proven experience and a strong background in wearing multiple hats. However, please note that this is not your usual VA role. We need someone who thinks beyond assigned tasks, takes initiative, and actively contributes to...
top_companies.full_description: We are hiring an assistant with proven experience and a strong background in wearing multiple hats. However, please note that this is not your usual VA role. We need someone who thinks beyond assigned tasks, takes initiative, and actively contributes to solving problems rather than just executing instructions. This is a full-time, long-term position for someone who is organized, coachable, proactive, and comfortable working in a fast-paced environment where priorities can shift quickly. ROLE OVERVIEW You will work directly with our Filipino executive assistant as a dependable partner, supporting the team across various areas of the business and day-to-day operations. This is best for someone who can show grace under pressure, help keep things organized, communicate clearly, and follow through on tasks. If you are resourceful, self-motivated, and confident in taking ownership of outcomes without being micromanaged, you may be the right fit for this role. WORKING HOURS • Full-time position • 40 hours per week • EST/EDT • Remote setup KEY RESPONSIBILITIES • Communicating with clients and teammates through CRM, Slack, and WhatsApp • Managing schedules, calendars, follow-ups, and day-to-day admin tasks • Handling ad hoc tasks as needed • Completing projects that help the business run smoothly and continue growing QUALIFICATIONS • Strong written and spoken English communication skills • Good organization skills and strong attention to detail • A coachable attitude and willingness to improve • The ability to think outside the box and complete tasks efficiently • Initiative to figure things out independently • A desire for long-term employment, not a part-time or temporary role • Proven experience with GoHighLevel, AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, etc.), Google Workspace, Canva, and executive assistance TECHNICAL AND WORK ENVIRONMENT REQUIREMENTS • Laptop or desktop with at least a 10th-gen i5 processor and 16 GB RAM • High-speed and stable internet connection • A backup internet connection (strongly preferred) • Quiet, professional workspace (dual monitor strongly preferred) • Noise-canceling headset • Backup power source or a contingency plan for outages (strongly preferred) COMPENSATION • $7 per hour • Paid bi-weekly • Payment cycle: every 10 working days HOW TO APPLY • Please use ZT as your subject line and use 10 AP points. • Submit a link to your CV/Portfolio using Google Drive. • Include a short video recording of yourself speaking in English. Introduce yourself, explain why you would be a good fit, and include any relevant work experience. • Make sure we can access and view the file. We won't request access. IMPORTANT • Applicants who do not follow the instructions will be immediately disqualified and will not receive a reply. HIRING PROCESS • Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. • Qualified applicants will be invited for a 30-minute to 1-hour interview. If you are looking for a stable, long-term role with room to grow your skills and increase your compensation over time, we look forward to reviewing your application.

top_companies.summary: # Business Funding Sales Development Representative (SDR) | Cold Caller | GoHighLevel CRM ## About Ascend Capital LLC Ascend Capital LLC helps businesses across the United States access the capital they need to grow. We specialize in business funding...
top_companies.full_description: # Business Funding Sales Development Representative (SDR) | Cold Caller | GoHighLevel CRM ## About Ascend Capital LLC Ascend Capital LLC helps businesses across the United States access the capital they need to grow. We specialize in business funding solutions, equipment financing, merchant services, and other financial products designed to help business owners expand their companies. We are building a long-term remote sales team and are looking for someone who is motivated, dependable, and eager to grow with us. This is not just another virtual assistant position—we're looking for someone who wants to become an important part of our company. --- ## What You'll Do Your primary responsibility will be contacting business owners throughout the United States to identify funding opportunities and schedule qualified appointments. Daily responsibilities include: * Make outbound cold calls to business owners * Qualify businesses based on our criteria * Follow our sales scripts and training * Update and manage leads inside GoHighLevel (GHL) * Send follow-up text messages and emails * Schedule appointments for our funding specialists * Keep detailed notes on every conversation * Maintain an organized sales pipeline * Meet daily call and activity goals * Learn our funding products and continuously improve your sales skills --- ## We're Looking For Someone Who * Speaks fluent English with a clear and professional phone presence * Is confident speaking with business owners * Is comfortable making 150–250 outbound calls per day * Learns quickly and accepts coaching * Is organized and detail-oriented * Works well independently * Has a reliable computer and high-speed internet * Is dependable and shows up consistently --- ## Preferred Experience Experience in any of the following is a plus: * Merchant Cash Advance (MCA) * Business Funding * Equipment Financing * Merchant Services * B2B Cold Calling * Appointment Setting * Sales Development Representative (SDR) * GoHighLevel (GHL) * CRM Management * Power Dialers No prior funding experience? That's okay. If you have strong B2B sales or cold calling experience and are willing to learn, we may provide training for the right candidate . --- ## Compensation * $3–$5 USD per hour (based on experience) * Performance bonuses * Opportunities for raises based on results * Long-term growth opportunities * Leadership opportunities as our company expands Our goal is to promote from within whenever possible. --- ## Equipment Requirements * Reliable computer * High-speed internet connection * Headset * Quiet workspace * Backup internet is a plus --- ## How to Apply Please answer the following questions in your application: 1. Tell us about your cold calling experience. 2. Have you worked in business funding or Merchant Cash Advance (MCA)? 3. What CRM systems have you used? 4. Have you used GoHighLevel? If so, describe your experience. 5. Have you used a power dialer? Which one? 6. Record a 60–90 second voice introduction telling us about yourself. 7. Include a screenshot of your internet speed. 8. What computer do you use? 9. Are you available to work U.S. Eastern Time? 10. Why do you believe you would be a great fit for this position? To show that you read the entire job post, include the phrase **"I climb mountains"** at the beginning of your application. Applications without this phrase may not be considered.

Tools etc.) • Website Development (HTML, CSS, Javascript etc.) • CRM Development Bonus: • App updates (React Native if you know it) Other: • Creating beautiful, concise, clean reports • Research • Etc. Our culture is fast-paced and every day is unique. WORKFLOW: For starters, you'll be assigned projects. You must take ownership in pushing the projects through completely from A to Z. Eventually, you'll need to pro-actively identify our shortcomings and opportunities, and propose projects. Looking for SMART, CRITICAL THINKERS! SCHEDULE 9:00am - 6:00 PM PST (Los Angeles time) Monday - Friday GROWTH: Payment increases over time. If you are outstanding, future leadership roles may be possible. TRAINING: You'll receive basic training, but every day is unique here. You must be a quick learner with a "can do - I'll figure it out" attitude. COMPANY CULTURE Working in a small business like ours is different from a large corporation. For example: • More creativity - You'll handle a wide variety of tasks and projects. This is more challenging than just following strict templates, but also more stimulating and exciting. • Impact - Your actions will have a big impact on the business, which you will clearly see • Feedback - Your feedback on what we are doing well, and what could be better, is not only valued, but is mandatory! ABOUT YOU: • Excellent written English (show this in your application!) • Coding experience • Technical - great with computers • Good listener - only needs to be told once • Strong communicator (you must OVERcommunicate with management and team members) • Smart, quick learner • Fastidious - attention to detail • Decent at basic math • Pro-active - anticipates what may be helpful and goes above and beyond to contribute • Meticulous, organized, methodical. • Reliable! Always shows up and focuses. • Critical, creative thinker. Not robotic. Always looking for better ways to do things. Always considering all the angles of a task. • Willing to share your opinion - we NEED to hear your opinions • Able to ask clarifying questions in order to get tasks right the first time • Always eager to improve yourself and the company’s systems. Habitually thinks strategically and takes action for improvements. • Self-starter • Independent decision maker • Flexible - can quickly adjust on the fly • Comfortable with excel • Fast computer • Fast, dependable Internet • Bonus if you have experience or interest in salsa or bachata! APPLY NOW. FORMAT YOUR APPLICATION AS A NUMBERED LIST WITH THE FOLLOWING: 1. Brief intro about you 2. Can you work the hours requested? 3. Complete this form: form.jotform.com/250204175159957 4. Write in the subject line of your application: 1. Grammar score 2. Typing WPM 3. Numbers assessment answer (regarding achieving $2,000 profit) 5. In which coding languages do you have education or experience? (Javascript, HTML, CSS, Python, Database software, React Native, Open Claw, n8n, Zoho CRM , Zoho Deluge, or anything else?) Rate yourself from 1 to 10 in each (will verify later via coding tests) • 1 = Super basic • 10 = I'm an outlier. Could code this language as senior programmer at world's best tech company 6. What is your competitive requested monthly payment for this full-time position? (Don't email me off the platform or message on social media - your application will be disqualified. Don't worry, I personally check every application here) Looking forward to meeting you! --------- Search: VA , virtual assistant , executive assistant , code , python , javascript , C , C+ , C++ , Deluge , API , AI , A.I. , artificial intelligence, llm , automate, automation , zoho , crm , deluge , make , n8n , zapier , react , react native , openclaw , open claw, cursor , claude code

top_companies.summary: I am hiring a full-time AI Automation Specialist to help run and improve a fast-moving sales and lead generation operation. This is not a basic VA role. I need someone who is highly experienced with AI tools, automation tools, CRM systems, and workflow...
top_companies.full_description: I am hiring a full-time AI Automation Specialist to help run and improve a fast-moving sales and lead generation operation. This is not a basic VA role. I need someone who is highly experienced with AI tools, automation tools, CRM systems, and workflow building. You must be able to use AI to move faster, organize systems, automate repetitive work, improve processes, create workflows, and support daily sales operations. Required tools include: - Claude - ChatGPT - Perplexity - Codex - GoHighLevel - Facebook Meta Business Suite - Google Workspace - Automation tools such as Zapier, Make, or similar platforms Perplexity, Claude, ChatGPT, GoHighLevel, and Meta experience are mandatory. If you do not use AI tools daily, do not apply. WHAT YOU WILL DO You will help with: - AI-assisted workflow creation - CRM organization and automation - GoHighLevel pipelines and follow-up systems - Meta Business Suite support - Facebook and Instagram lead management - Lead tracking and reporting - Automation of repetitive tasks - Appointment setting support - Google Sheets / Drive organization - Daily KPI reports - Process improvement - Sales support systems - Creating scripts, templates, and operational workflows You will be expected to think like an operator, not just an assistant. If a task is repetitive, I expect you to find a way to make it faster, cleaner, or automated. REQUIRED EXPERIENCE You must have real experience with: - Claude - ChatGPT - Perplexity - GoHighLevel - Facebook Meta Business Suite - Google Sheets - Google Drive - CRM systems - Workflow automation - Lead generation or sales support - Daily reporting Preferred experience: - Codex - Zapier - Make - WhatsApp Business - Facebook Marketplace - Craigslist - Meta Ads Manager - Appointment setting - Automotive sales support MUST HAVE - Strong English - Fast typing - Reliable internet - Ability to work 40 hours per week - Ability to clock in and out - Comfortable with screen tracking during work hours - Strong attention to detail - Ability to follow instructions exactly - Ability to think independently - Ability to use AI tools to work faster - Honesty about your actual skill level IMPORTANT This is a full-time production role. Time compliance is non-negotiable. Screen tracking is required. Daily reports are required. You must be comfortable being measured by activity, accuracy, and results. Do not apply if you are only a basic VA. Do not apply if you are not strong with AI tools. Do not apply if you are exaggerating your automation experience. COMPENSATION $400/month during training/probation. Commission available after training based on appointments, shows, and completed results. This role can earn more if you produce. HOW TO APPLY Use the subject line: AI AUTOMATION SPECIALIST Answer every question below in order: 1. How many hours per week can you work? 2. Are you comfortable with clock-in/clock-out and screen monitoring? 3. How do you use ChatGPT in your daily workflow? 4. How do you use Claude in your daily workflow? 5. How do you use Perplexity in your daily workflow? 6. Have you used Codex or any AI coding/workflow tool? Explain. 7. Have you used GoHighLevel? What exactly did you build or manage? 8. Have you used Facebook Meta Business Suite? What did you manage? 9. What automation tools have you used? Zapier, Make, Power Automate, or others? 10. Give one specific example of a workflow you automated. 11. Have you done lead generation or appointment setting before? 12. What tools are you strongest with? 13. What tools do you still need training on? 14. Are you willing to complete a paid test task before being hired full-time? FINAL NOTE I am looking for someone sharp, serious, AI-capable, and automation-minded. The right person will help build systems, speed up workflows, organize leads, and make the operation faster every week. If you are excellent with AI tools, automation, CRM systems, and execution, this can become a strong long-term opportunity.

top_companies.summary: Growth Marketing Specialist We are looking for a proactive, commercially minded Growth Marketing Specialist to help scale our online sales across our website and multiple marketplaces. This is a hands-on, all-round digital marketing role covering SEO, PPC...
top_companies.full_description: Growth Marketing Specialist We are looking for a proactive, commercially minded Growth Marketing Specialist to help scale our online sales across our website and multiple marketplaces. This is a hands-on, all-round digital marketing role covering SEO, PPC, social media, email marketing, analytics, CRO, AI tools and automation. We need someone who can confidently work across multiple marketing channels, spot opportunities, test ideas, improve performance and help drive consistent growth. The role is ideal for someone who enjoys taking ownership, analysing results, improving campaigns and finding new ways to increase traffic, visibility, conversions and sales. About the Role You will be responsible for increasing website traffic, improving search visibility, growing brand awareness and maximising return on marketing activity. This is a full-funnel, growth-focused role combining: SEO Paid advertising Social media marketing Email marketing Website growth and CRO Analytics and reporting AI and automation Market and competitor research You should be organised, commercially aware, confident working with data and able to turn insights into clear actions. Key Responsibilities SEO & Website Visibility Carry out keyword research Optimise product pages, collections, categories and blog content Improve meta titles, descriptions and internal linking Monitor Google Search Console Identify ranking opportunities Carry out competitor SEO research Support technical SEO improvements PPC & Paid Advertising Manage and optimise campaigns across: Google Ads Google Shopping Performance Max Amazon PPC Meta Ads Pinterest Ads TikTok Ads Responsibilities include: Campaign creation Budget management Bid optimisation Audience creation Remarketing Performance reporting ROAS optimisation Search term analysis Negative keywords Product selection Social Media Growth Manage and grow our presence across platforms such as: Facebook Instagram Pinterest TikTok LinkedIn where appropriate Responsibilities include: Planning content calendars Creating content ideas Helping produce short-form videos and reels Creating captions Scheduling content Monitoring engagement Researching trends Reviewing competitors Exploring new social platforms and growth opportunities Email Marketing Create and improve email campaigns including: Product launches Promotional emails Newsletters Automated flows Abandoned cart emails Customer segmentation Performance analysis Experience with Klaviyo or a similar email platform would be beneficial. Website Growth & CRO Improve conversion rates Recommend landing page improvements Support A/B testing ideas Improve user journeys Review product and category performance Support promotional campaigns Suggest ways to increase sales and average order value Analytics & Reporting Track and report on performance across: Google Analytics 4 Google Search Console Google Merchant Center Google Ads Amazon PPC Social media analytics Email marketing performance You will help create clear reports showing traffic, rankings, conversions, sales, ROAS and growth opportunities. AI & Automation Research and test new AI tools Improve marketing workflows Build simple automations Create and improve SOPs Identify efficiency improvements Support the use of AI across marketing and content tasks Market & Competitor Research Monitor competitor pricing Analyse competitor marketing Research trends Identify new opportunities Recommend improvements across products, collections and campaigns Skills & Experience We are looking for someone with experience in: Google Ads Amazon PPC SEO Shopify Google Analytics Google Search Console Google Merchant Center Meta Business Suite Klaviyo or similar email platform Canva ChatGPT and AI tools Excellent written English Strong analytical skills You should be confident managing several growth channels at the same time and able to work independently while reporting clearly on performance. What Success Looks Like Increased website traffic Improved search rankings Higher PPC return on ad spend Consistent social media growth Increased email revenue Better website conversion rates Clear, actionable reporting Continuous growth and optimisation Who This Role Is For This role is ideal for a hands-on digital marketer who enjoys owning performance across multiple channels and helping an ecommerce business grow. We are looking for someone who is practical, organised, commercially focused and excited by SEO, PPC, email, social media, analytics, CRO and AI-powered marketing improvements. If you are a true all-round growth marketing specialist who can turn ideas, data and opportunities into action, we would love to hear from you.

all_jobs_for_company.full_description: Ecommerce Merchandising & Marketplace Specialist Location: Remote About the Role We are looking for an experienced Ecommerce Merchandising & Marketplace Specialist to take ownership of our products across our ecommerce website and multiple online marketplaces. You will be responsible for ensuring every product is presented professionally, optimised for conversions, and consistently maintained across all sales channels. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys ecommerce, organisation, creativity, accuracy and continual improvement. Key Responsibilities Product Listing Management Create new product listings from supplier information Write clear, compelling product titles and descriptions Complete product specifications, attributes and product details Upload dimensions, materials, care information and other key details Create product variations, bundles and product options Maintain and improve existing listings Ensure product information is accurate across all platforms Website Management — Shopify Upload and manage products on Shopify Create and update collections Maintain website navigation and menus Update homepage content when required Create landing pages for products, collections and campaigns Merchandise seasonal promotions Create cross-sell and upsell opportunities Optimise product recommendations Monitor website quality, consistency and presentation Marketplace Management Manage products across multiple marketplaces, including: Amazon eBay Wayfair B&Q Marketplace OnBuy TikTok Shop Other current and future sales channels Responsibilities include: Create and optimise marketplace listings Resolve listing errors and marketplace issues Manage parent and child variations Complete flat file uploads where required Keep catalogue information up to date Ensure listing compliance Update inventory and product information Manage storefront updates Support Amazon Brand Registry tasks Create and update Amazon A+ Content Monitor marketplace account health Product Merchandising Create seasonal collections Manage featured products Build bestseller and new arrival collections Improve cross-selling and upselling opportunities Support category merchandising Recommend product presentation improvements Help ensure products are displayed in a way that improves sales and customer experience Creative Content Using AI tools and design software, you will help improve the visual presentation of our products. This may include: Editing supplier images Creating AI lifestyle images Removing backgrounds Resizing and optimising images Creating infographics Creating feature graphics Producing comparison charts Creating Amazon A+ Content Creating website banners when required Product Optimisation Improve product content Improve product imagery Optimise product attributes Maintain consistency across all sales channels Improve conversion rates Monitor competitor products and listings Suggest merchandising and content improvements SEO, Research & Listing Optimisation Research is an important part of this role. You will help improve product listings by looking at products, competitors, keywords and customer search behaviour. Responsibilities include: Carry out product and marketplace research Review competitor listings for wording, layout, images, pricing and selling points Research how similar products are presented across ecommerce websites and marketplaces Work target keywords naturally into titles, descriptions, bullet points and attributes Ensure content is SEO-friendly but still reads well for customers Avoid keyword-stuffing and poor-quality content Ensure product images, specifications, variations, collections and content are accurate Refresh listings as products, search terms, competitors or marketplace rules change Business Support Manage supplier product data Complete product data entry Maintain spreadsheets and product records Assist with marketplace reporting Carry out competitor research Assist with new product launches Create and maintain SOPs Recommend AI and automation improvements Support the business with new ecommerce opportunities and future sales channels Channels You Will Work Across You will help manage and improve products across: Ecommerce website — Shopify Online marketplaces Social commerce platforms such as TikTok Shop Retail marketplaces New and future sales channels The aim is to keep all channels working together with accurate product information, strong presentation and consistent brand standards. Skills & Experience We are looking for someone with experience in: Shopify Amazon Seller Central eBay Ecommerce merchandising Product listing management AI image editing Canva or Adobe Express Amazon A+ Content Microsoft Excel or Google Sheets ChatGPT and AI tools Excellent written English Exceptional attention to detail Experience with Wayfair, B&Q Marketplace, OnBuy, TikTok Shop or other marketplaces would be beneficial. What Success Looks Like Success in this role means: New products are uploaded quickly and accurately Product listings are high quality across every sales channel Product imagery looks professional throughout the catalogue Website and marketplace collections are well organised Marketplace accounts remain healthy Product information is accurate and consistent Listings continue to improve over time The business finds new opportunities across ecommerce and marketplaces

top_companies.summary: We run a 7-figure health & wellness eCommerce brand selling to the Netherlands. We're looking for an experienced, autonomous funnel builder who can take a product and ship a complete, high-converting advertorial funnel — build, copy, and tracking — without...
top_companies.full_description: We run a 7-figure health & wellness eCommerce brand selling to the Netherlands. We're looking for an experienced, autonomous funnel builder who can take a product and ship a complete, high-converting advertorial funnel — build, copy, and tracking — without hand-holding. This is not a junior "drag-and-drop the template" role. We want someone who owns the funnel end to end and can spot why one converts and another doesn't. What you'll do: Build advertorial funnels in Funnelish (V2), write or adapt the advertorial and product-page copy for the Dutch market in care/comfort language (no medical claims), and set up clean conversion tracking. You'll make sure every funnel is QA'd, mobile-perfect, and firing Purchase events correctly before it goes live. You're a fit if you: Have built advertorial / direct-response funnels that actually scaled (not just landing pages) Know Funnelish (or ClickFunnels/similar and can move to Funnelish fast) Can set up and debug server-side tracking — Meta CAPI, pixel, Thank You page events (we use WeTracked) Have experience with Dutch checkout flows, especially iDEAL — and understand the tracking gap when customers pay via bank redirect and don't return to the Thank You page Understand Shopify product/checkout flow and how it connects to a funnel Write clean, persuasive copy and can localise tone for a Dutch audience Work independently, follow SOPs precisely, and document your work You're not a fit if you: Only know how to fill in a pre-made template Have never touched conversion tracking or can't tell when a pixel isn't firing Need constant supervision In your message, please include a link to ONE advertorial funnel you built (live URL or screenshots), and tell me in one or two lines how you set up the tracking on it. Tell me which funnel and tracking tools you use. Full-time, remote. We'll discuss rate after a short paid test task.

all_jobs_for_company.full_description: We run a 7-figure health & wellness eCommerce brand selling to the Netherlands. We're looking for an experienced, autonomous funnel builder who can take a product and ship a complete, high-converting advertorial funnel — build, copy, and tracking — without hand-holding. This is not a junior "drag-and-drop the template" role. We want someone who owns the funnel end to end and can spot why one converts and another doesn't. What you'll do: Build advertorial funnels in Funnelish (V2), write or adapt the advertorial and product-page copy for the Dutch market in care/comfort language (no medical claims), and set up clean conversion tracking. You'll make sure every funnel is QA'd, mobile-perfect, and firing Purchase events correctly before it goes live. You're a fit if you: Have built advertorial / direct-response funnels that actually scaled (not just landing pages) Know Funnelish (or ClickFunnels/similar and can move to Funnelish fast) Can set up and debug server-side tracking — Meta CAPI, pixel, Thank You page events (we use WeTracked) Have experience with Dutch checkout flows, especially iDEAL — and understand the tracking gap when customers pay via bank redirect and don't return to the Thank You page Understand Shopify product/checkout flow and how it connects to a funnel Write clean, persuasive copy and can localise tone for a Dutch audience Work independently, follow SOPs precisely, and document your work You're not a fit if you: Only know how to fill in a pre-made template Have never touched conversion tracking or can't tell when a pixel isn't firing Need constant supervision In your message, please include a link to ONE advertorial funnel you built (live URL or screenshots), and tell me in one or two lines how you set up the tracking on it. Tell me which funnel and tracking tools you use. Full-time, remote. We'll discuss rate after a short paid test task.

top_companies.summary: BACKEND-FIRST WORDPRESS DEVELOPER REQUIRED — PLEASE READ BEFORE APPLYING This is not a basic Elementor design role. We are looking for a highly skilled WordPress developer with strong backend development, troubleshooting, custom PHP, webhook integration...
top_companies.full_description: BACKEND-FIRST WORDPRESS DEVELOPER REQUIRED — PLEASE READ BEFORE APPLYING This is not a basic Elementor design role. We are looking for a highly skilled WordPress developer with strong backend development, troubleshooting, custom PHP, webhook integration, email configuration, and custom integration experience. Backend experience is the most critical need for this role. However, you must also have strong front-end skills and be able to accurately build modern, responsive, high-end websites from provided mockups and design direction. If you mostly depend on plugins, templates, WP Forms, Contact Form 7, or drag-and-drop tools to build functionality, this is not the right role for you. You must be able to work with custom PHP, JavaScript, AJAX, WPCode Snippets, custom forms, webhooks, WP SMTP, email configuration, Stripe, Mailchimp, WooCommerce, booking plugins, responsive layouts, custom CSS, and backend WordPress troubleshooting. A critical part of this role will involve building, connecting, and troubleshooting webhooks, form submissions, automated email workflows, SMTP issues, payment notifications, booking notifications, and other backend communication between WordPress and third-party tools. You must also be able to take provided mockups and build clean, polished, mobile-responsive pages with strong attention to layout, spacing, typography, responsiveness, and visual accuracy. We need someone who can fix technical problems, resolve plugin conflicts, troubleshoot broken functionality, test integrations, and make the website work properly without needing constant step-by-step instructions. PLEASE DO NOT APPLY if you cannot confidently handle backend WordPress development, PHP troubleshooting, webhooks, email configuration, custom integrations, and clean front-end execution. ABOUT THE ROLE We are looking for a backend-first WordPress developer who can also execute high-quality front-end website builds. Our websites include custom integrations and custom applications using PHP, JavaScript, AJAX, CSS, WordPress functionality, webhooks, third-party tools, custom forms, email systems, booking systems, payment integrations, WooCommerce, responsive layouts, and performance optimization. This role is not for someone who only builds pages in Elementor or installs templates. We need someone who can build, customize, troubleshoot, and support modern WordPress websites that require backend thinking, custom code, webhook logic, email configuration, front-end accuracy, and real issue resolution. We build our websites using WordPress, Elementor Pro, WPCode Snippets, custom PHP, JavaScript, AJAX, CSS, webhooks, and custom integrations. We do not use templates. We will provide mockups and design direction. You must be able to execute those mockups accurately on the front end while also making sure the backend functionality works properly. Please review these websites before applying: 100bmod.org organizedmovements.com If you cannot support, troubleshoot, and build websites at this level, please do not apply. CRITICAL REQUIREMENT The most important requirement for this role is backend WordPress experience. Again, this is not just an Elementor design role. This is a backend-focused WordPress role for someone who can troubleshoot, code, integrate, configure, and resolve technical problems independently. PHP, webhooks, custom integrations, and email configuration are critical needs for this role. You must be able to troubleshoot and resolve issues related to: Custom PHP functionality Webhook setup and troubleshooting Webhook-based form submissions Webhook notifications and automation AJAX and JavaScript functionality Custom form submissions WP SMTP and email delivery Email configuration and deliverability issues Automated email notifications Booking confirmation emails Payment notification emails Stripe webhook/payment notifications Mailchimp integration and automation WooCommerce setup and troubleshooting WooCommerce email issues Booking plugin setup and troubleshooting Plugin conflicts Broken site functionality WordPress performance issues Mobile and browser-specific issues Backend errors Database or configuration-related issues Custom WordPress workflows Custom integrations that require code beyond basic plugin setup We are especially looking for someone who can create and troubleshoot custom forms using PHP, AJAX, JavaScript, webhooks, and proper email configuration. We are not looking for someone who only knows WP Forms, Contact Form 7, or basic drag-and-drop form plugins. Plugins may be part of the workflow, but you must know how to troubleshoot them, customize them, connect them properly, configure email delivery, and fix issues when they do not work as expected. FRONT-END REQUIREMENT Backend experience is the priority, but strong front-end development is also required. You must be able to take provided mockups, references, or design direction and build the website accurately in WordPress. You should have a strong eye for: Layout Spacing Typography Responsiveness Mobile presentation Visual hierarchy Clean front-end execution Modern luxury website design Animation and interactive effects Custom CSS Cross-browser consistency We do not need someone who only makes pages look nice. We need someone who can make the website look good and function correctly. REQUIRED SKILLS Strong WordPress backend development experience Custom PHP development Webhook integration Webhook troubleshooting Email configuration WP SMTP / email delivery troubleshooting JavaScript AJAX HTML5 CSS3 Custom CSS Elementor / Elementor Pro WPCode Snippets Custom form integrations Custom email notifications WooCommerce integration WooCommerce email troubleshooting Stripe integration Stripe webhook troubleshooting Mailchimp integration Booking plugins such as Amelia Booking notification setup and troubleshooting Events calendar plugins Advanced Custom Fields / ACF Custom WordPress functionality Dynamic content development Plugin conflict troubleshooting Backend issue resolution WordPress maintenance and troubleshooting Website performance optimization Speed optimization Responsive web development Mobile optimization Cross-browser testing Mockup-to-website development Modern front-end development SEO best practices Google Analytics integration Google Search Console setup WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING Building custom WordPress websites using Elementor Pro and custom code Creating custom forms using PHP, AJAX, JavaScript, and webhooks Setting up and troubleshooting WP SMTP and email delivery Configuring and troubleshooting automated website emails Building and troubleshooting webhook-based workflows Setting up and troubleshooting booking plugins such as Amelia Integrating Stripe, Mailchimp, WooCommerce, and other tools Troubleshooting Stripe webhooks, payment notifications, and checkout issues Troubleshooting WooCommerce emails and backend functionality Writing and modifying PHP, CSS, JavaScript, and AJAX Creating custom functionality through WPCode Snippets or theme-level code Troubleshooting plugin conflicts and backend errors Fixing broken forms, checkout issues, email issues, booking issues, and webhook issues Fixing custom functionality when plugins do not work correctly Testing forms, payments, bookings, emails, webhooks, and integrations before submitting work Converting mockups into fully responsive WordPress websites Building polished front-end layouts with clean spacing, typography, and mobile responsiveness Optimizing websites for speed, performance, mobile, and SEO Maintaining and improving existing client websites WHO THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR This role is not for someone who only knows Elementor design. This role is not for someone who only installs plugins and templates. This role is not for someone who depends on plugins for every feature. This role is not for someone who cannot troubleshoot backend issues. This role is not for someone who only uses WP Forms or Contact Form 7. This role is not for someone who cannot write or understand PHP, AJAX, JavaScript, and webhook logic. This role is not for someone who cannot configure or troubleshoot email delivery issues. This role is not for someone who cannot build responsive front-end layouts from mockups. This role is not for someone who ignores spacing, mobile layout, typography, or visual polish. This role is not for someone who disappears, misses deadlines, or needs constant follow-up. This role is not for someone who says “it should work” without testing and resolving the issue. This role is not for someone who cannot take ownership of technical problems. WHO THIS ROLE IS FOR This role is for someone who understands how WordPress works beyond the page builder. You should be comfortable reviewing errors, testing functionality, identifying plugin conflicts, fixing custom code, configuring SMTP, troubleshooting email delivery, building webhook integrations, improving performance, and making sure every part of the website works correctly. You should also be comfortable building clean, modern, responsive front-end layouts that match provided mockups and design direction. You must be able to work independently, communicate clearly, meet deadlines, and take ownership of technical issues until they are resolved. We need someone who can think through problems, not someone who waits for step-by-step instructions for every issue. You may use Codex or AI coding tools to assist with coding, but you must understand the code, test it properly, and be able to fix problems yourself. TO APPLY Please send the following: 1. Your best WordPress websites that include custom functionality 2. Examples of backend WordPress issues you have solved 3. Examples of custom forms you have built using PHP, AJAX, JavaScript, or webhooks 4. Examples of webhook integrations you have built or troubleshot 5. Examples of WP SMTP, email configuration, or email deliverability issues you have resolved 6. Examples of Stripe, Mailchimp, WooCommerce, or booking plugin work 7. Examples of front-end websites you built from mockups or design direction 8. A short explanation of your backend WordPress experience 9. Your availability 10. Confirmation that you reviewed 100bmod.org and organizedmovements.com Applications that only show basic Elementor websites will not be considered. To confirm you've read this posting, begin your application with: "Backend First," followed by two sentences explaining the most complex custom WordPress backend feature you've built, such as a custom plugin, API integration, custom PHP application, database architecture, webhook workflow, advanced email configuration, or similar backend solution, and the business problem it solved.

top_companies.summary: We are a fast-growing U.S. based digital marketing agency specializing in SEO, content marketing, Google Business Profile management, PPC, and lead generation for home service businesses. We are not looking for a generic virtual assistant. We are looking for...
top_companies.full_description: We are a fast-growing U.S. based digital marketing agency specializing in SEO, content marketing, Google Business Profile management, PPC, and lead generation for home service businesses. We are not looking for a generic virtual assistant. We are looking for a highly organized, detail-oriented, process-driven team member who can help support our content, SEO, sales, and operations teams while maintaining a high standard of quality. If you miss details, struggle with deadlines, or need constant supervision, this role is not for you. If you enjoy organization, accountability, and working in a fast-paced agency environment, keep reading. What You Will Be Doing: Auditing recorded client phone calls and scoring lead quality. Creating client sales decks. Creating and publishing Google Business Profile posts. Uploading and formatting blog content in WordPress. Adding images, categories, tags, internal links, and alt text when instructed. Updating internal tracking spreadsheets and reports. Following detailed SOPs and checklists. Performing quality assurance reviews before content is published. Supporting SEO and content production workflows. Maintaining accurate client records and project tracking. Minimum Requirements: 1+ years of Virtual Assistant, Administrative Assistant, Marketing Assistant, or related experience. Experience using WordPress. Experience using Google Sheets or Microsoft Excel. Ability to work full U.S. Eastern Time business hours. Strong written English communication skills. Excellent attention to detail. Ability to follow documented processes without constant supervision. Strong organizational and time-management skills. Reliable computer and high-speed internet connection. Preferred Experience: Google Business Profile management Content publishing Quality assurance or call auditing Experience using ClickUp Marketing agency experience Basic SEO knowledge Compensation & Schedule: Full-Time Position Required business hours: 8a EST - 5p EST or 9a EST to 6p EST $5-$6 USD per hour based on experience What Success Looks Like in This Role: You catch mistakes before clients do You follow instructions carefully without cutting corners You communicate proactively when issues arise You take ownership of your work You consistently maintain accurate trackers and reports You can handle repetitive tasks without sacrificing quality You understand that details directly impact client results Application Instructions: To be considered, submit your resume and a 2-3 minute video to lauren@lumesales.com answering the following questions: What experience do you have with WordPress? Are you familiar with using website builders such as Oxygen, Divi, or Elementor? What experience do you have with call auditing? Why is attention to detail important in your work? This is a long-term opportunity for someone who wants stability, growth, and the chance to become a key contributor within a growing digital marketing agency. If you are organized, dependable, detail-oriented, and take pride in doing things right the first time, we want to hear from you. Please send all applications to lauren@lumesales.com.
