top_companies.summary: Local SEO Specialist (MUST HAVE AI AUTOMATION SKILLS IN LOCAL SEO) Full-Time - Makarios Marketing | [Remote] About the Role We're not looking for a traditional SEO hire. We're looking for a rare hybrid: someone who lives and breathes local SEO and thinks like...
top_companies.full_description: Local SEO Specialist (MUST HAVE AI AUTOMATION SKILLS IN LOCAL SEO) Full-Time - Makarios Marketing | [Remote] About the Role We're not looking for a traditional SEO hire. We're looking for a rare hybrid: someone who lives and breathes local SEO and thinks like an AI engineer. You'll be responsible for delivering measurable search results for our clients while simultaneously building the tools, agents, and automations that put us years ahead of the competition. If you've ever thought, "I could automate this with an agent," while doing SEO work — this role was written for you. Read this entire post before applying. We mean it. Most SEO job posts get flooded with copy-paste applications from people who skimmed the title. This isn't that kind of job, and we're not that kind of company. If you're looking for a basic SEO role where you build a few links and write some meta descriptions, please move on. This role will frustrate you. If you're someone who loses sleep thinking about why a map pack result is where it is, and you've ever opened n8n or Claude Code just because you were curious — keep reading. Who We Are We're a results-driven SEO company that doesn't just execute strategies — we build the tools and systems that make those strategies unstoppable. We work in local SEO and we take it seriously. We're growing and we need someone who can grow with us, contribute ideas from day one, and help us deliver things to clients that no one else in the market is offering. What This Role Actually Is You will own local SEO strategy and execution across client accounts and you will build AI-powered tools and automations that make our work faster, smarter, and more valuable. These two responsibilities are equally important. You can't do one without the other here. This is not a junior role. This is not a "we'll train you on AI" role. You need to come in already capable. Your Day-to-Day Responsibilities Build and execute deep local SEO strategies — Google Business Profile, map pack optimization, local citations, geo-targeted content, and local link building Identify automation opportunities in our SEO workflows and build agents using Claude Code and n8n to handle them Create custom client-facing tools and reporting dashboards that go beyond anything a standard We're looking for a rare hybrid: someone who lives and breathes local SEO and thinks like an AI engineer. You'll be responsible for delivering measurable search results for our clients while simultaneously building the tools, agents, and automations that put us years ahead of the competition. If you've ever thought, "I could automate this with an agent," while doing SEO work — this role was written for you. Read this entire post before applying. We mean it. Most SEO job posts get flooded with copy-paste applications from people who skimmed the title. This isn't that kind of job, and we're not that kind of company. If you're looking for a basic SEO role where you build a few links and write some meta descriptions, please move on. This role will frustrate you. If you're someone who loses sleep thinking about why a map pack result is where it is, and you've ever opened n8n or Claude Code just because you were curious — keep reading. Who We Are We're a results-driven SEO company that doesn't just execute strategies — we build the tools and systems that make those strategies unstoppable. We work in local SEO and we take it seriously. We're growing and we need someone who can grow with us, contribute ideas from day one, and help us deliver things to clients that no one else in the market is offering. What This Role Actually Is You will own local SEO strategy and execution across client accounts and you will build AI-powered tools and automations that make our work faster, smarter, and more valuable. These two responsibilities are equally important. You can't do one without the other here. This is not a junior role. This is not a "we'll train you on AI" role. You need to come in already capable. top_companies.summary: Job Title Full-Time AI Builder for Trades Software Startup (ChatGPT, Claude, Zapier) Job Type Full-time, long-term remote role. Philippines only. Compensation PHP 50,000–70,000/month, depending on experience and fit, plus performance-based bonuses as the...
top_companies.full_description: Job Title Full-Time AI Builder for Trades Software Startup (ChatGPT, Claude, Zapier) Job Type Full-time, long-term remote role. Philippines only. Compensation PHP 50,000–70,000/month, depending on experience and fit, plus performance-based bonuses as the business grows. This role starts with a 60-day trial period. Compensation and responsibilities can grow if the fit is strong. Working Hours Full-time. We are flexible on the exact schedule, but you must be able to work 8 hours somewhere between 6:00 AM and 6:00 PM Pacific Time. Job Description We are starting a new software business focused on building practical AI-powered tools for trades businesses. The business is early-stage and pre-revenue, so we are looking for someone resourceful, technical, honest, and comfortable building from the ground up. This is not a basic VA role and not a pure coding role. We are looking for a full-time AI builder and support lead who can use tools like ChatGPT, Claude, and Zapier to create useful workflows, test them carefully, document them clearly, and eventually help support customers. You do not need to be a software developer. Coding is not required. But you must be comfortable with AI tools, automations, troubleshooting, and learning new systems quickly. What You’ll Do Build AI workflows and automations using tools like ChatGPT, Claude, Zapier, Google Workspace, and similar tools. Turn messy business problems into simple workflows. Test automations carefully and make sure they actually work. Write prompts and improve AI outputs. Document systems, SOPs, and customer instructions. Help troubleshoot customer issues once we launch. Create short Loom-style walkthrough videos when helpful. Work directly with the founders to build and improve the business. Required Skills Required: - Strong English writing and communication. - Strong experience using ChatGPT and/or Claude. - Familiarity with Zapier. - Comfortable learning new AI tools and automation tools. - Strong problem-solving ability. - Detail-oriented testing mindset. - Ability to explain technical issues simply. - Reliable internet and reliable work habits. - Comfortable working in an early-stage startup. Nice to have: - Make, n8n, Airtable, Notion, Google Sheets, or CRM automation experience. - Experience with customer support. - Experience making Loom videos or help docs. - Experience with trades, home service, construction, or contractor businesses. - Basic API/webhook familiarity. Who This Role Is For You should apply if: - You enjoy building useful AI workflows, not just talking about AI. - You like figuring things out. - You are organized and careful. - You can work independently without needing every step explained. - You are comfortable supporting customers and troubleshooting issues. - You want a long-term full-time role where you can grow with the business. You should not apply if: - You only want basic VA tasks. - You have only used AI casually. - You need every task explained step-by-step. - You do not like troubleshooting. - You are not comfortable with customer support. Application Instructions To apply, complete this application form: mission.revivepaintingang.uk/apply-ai-builder Please include a Loom/video link showing an AI automation or workflow you have built. If you do not have one already, record a short walkthrough of your most impressive AI/automation project. Important: We will only review candidates who complete the form. Please do not send a generic copy/paste message. In your OLJ message, include the phrase: TRADES AI BUILDER so we know you read the full post.

top_companies.summary: Virtual Assistant – Retail & Dispensary Operations About Us We are a fast-growing retail and cannabis company operating multiple dynamic businesses. We are building a strong operational team to support continued growth, maintain compliance, and ensure...
top_companies.full_description: Virtual Assistant – Retail & Dispensary Operations About Us We are a fast-growing retail and cannabis company operating multiple dynamic businesses. We are building a strong operational team to support continued growth, maintain compliance, and ensure seamless day-to-day operations across all our businesses. We are looking for a highly organized Virtual Assistant with experience/ to support our administrative operations, inventory tracking, financial coordination, and overall business efficiency. Position Overview This role is focused on keeping our storefronts organized and supporting day-to-day business activities behind the scenes. The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, proactive, highly responsive, and comfortable handling multiple responsibilities in a fast-paced environment. This is a remote overseas position with long-term growth potential. Responsibilities Inventory, Compliance & POS Management Metrc Management: Oversee and maintain accurate compliance tracking and reporting. Inventory Management: Track stock levels, coordinate replenishments, and ensure system accuracy. POS Management: Maintain and update Point of Sale systems (experience with systems like Cova POS is a plus). Product Information: Upload and manage product images, descriptions, and metadata across systems. Menu & Loyalty Maintenance: Audit online menus regularly for accuracy and manage customer loyalty profiles. Business Operations & Administration Business Operational Management: Support high-level day-to-day activities to keep storefronts running smoothly. SOP Creation: Develop, document, and update Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) for new and existing workflows. Brand Onboarding: Facilitate the seamless integration of new brands into our retail ecosystem. Promotions: Coordinate and schedule promotional campaigns and discounts across platforms. Finance & Data Analytics Accounts Payable: Assist with tracking invoices, managing vendor payments, and maintaining financial organization. Payroll Management: Support payroll tracking and administrative processing. Sales Analytics: Pull reports and analyze sales data to help drive informed business decisions. Communications & Support Communication Management: Act as a central point of contact for internal and external operational inquiries. Email Management: Organize inboxes, draft responses, and ensure timely follow-ups with partners and vendors. Qualifications Cannabis industry experience preferred. Not Required Strong written and verbal English communication. Highly organized, detail-oriented, and capable of working independently. Professional attitude and ability to manage confidential business and financial information. Proficient in utilizing AI tools to automate workflows, summarize data, and improve efficiency. Experience with Google Workspace, spreadsheets, and CRM/POS systems. Preferred Experience Administrative, executive assistant, or operational management experience. Experience supporting cannabis brands, dispensaries, or retail storefronts. Familiarity with compliance and operations platforms (e.g., Metrc). Experience using AI tools (ChatGPT, Gemini, Claud, Notion AI, Zapier) to streamline repetitive administrative tasks. Compensation Competitive pay based on experience. Fully remote position. Opportunity for long-term growth within a multi-location company

top_companies.full_description: Caliber Workforce | Revenue Operations (Home Services) APPLY HERE: www.caliberworkforce.com/aicareers Caliber Workforce is a premium, AI-fluent staffing platform for founder-operators at growth-stage businesses. We don't place generic virtual assistants. We place vetted operators into defined roles with the Caliber Operating System: a role-specific Toolkit, a 90-day Playbook, continuous AI training, and market intelligence. We're placing a Revenue Operations operator into a U.S.-based home services business. This is not a general admin role. You'll own the demand-side machinery: outbound, lead enrichment, CRM hygiene, follow-up cadences, and pipeline reporting. You'll give the founder better lead flow, cleaner data, and tighter sales support systems, using AI to keep the pipeline moving without manual drag. WHAT YOU'LL OWN: Run the demand-side machinery: outbound, lead enrichment, and follow-up cadences Keep the CRM clean: accurate records, deduped data, and reliable pipeline stages Build and manage follow-up sequences so no lead or estimate goes cold Enrich and qualify inbound leads so the team spends time on the right jobs Build automations that move leads through the pipeline without manual rework Use AI to draft outreach, score leads, and surface follow-ups that need attention Track and report pipeline: lead volume, conversion, booked jobs, and revenue Flag stalled deals and pipeline gaps before they cost the month TOOLS YOU SHOULD KNOW (some or all): A CRM like HubSpot, Pipedrive, or Salesforce ServiceTitan, Jobber, or Housecall Pro (home services systems) Outbound and enrichment tools (email sequencers, lead-data tools) Zapier or Make for workflow automation Google Workspace or Microsoft 365 Claude and ChatGPT (AI fluency is tested, not assumed) Slack, Zoom, or phone/SMS coordination WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR: 2+ years in revenue operations, sales operations, CRM management, or lead generation AI-fluent: you already use Claude or ChatGPT to run outreach and clean data, and you can build a simple automation Strong written and verbal English communication Home services, trades, or field service experience strongly preferred You're rigorous about data and follow-up: nothing slips through You manage multiple pipelines and cadences simultaneously without losing track You're proactive about flagging stalled deals and pipeline gaps before they escalate Comfortable working U.S. business hours aligned with your client's time zone Stable internet connection and a professional remote work setup HOW CALIBER MATCHES YOU: Every operator goes through an 81-question behavioral assessment across 6 dimensions, a role-specific skills assessment, and an AI-transcribed video interview reviewed by Claude We place at an 85% minimum match score. You're not just available. You're matched to a role and a client where you'll perform and grow. WHAT CALIBER PROVIDES: Full-time, long-term placement at 40 hours per week. Not project-based or seasonal. 5-day onboarding with the Caliber Operating System. You start the Monday after your client signs. A role-specific Toolkit: prompt libraries, SOP templates, and workflow templates tuned to home services revenue operations A 90-day Playbook with structured check-ins at Day 1, Week 1, Day 30, and Day 90, then quarterly Quarterly AI training so your skills stay current as the tools change 10 days PTO annually after the 90-day mark, plus 5 sick days available immediately A company that invests in your success, not just your output WHY CALIBER IS DIFFERENT: Most offshore staffing companies hand you a title and disappear. Caliber doesn't. You're matched on evidence, not availability. 81 questions. 6 dimensions. 85% minimum match. You get a role-specific operating system, continuous AI training, and a 90-day Playbook that tells both you and your client exactly where the placement landed. We treat you as an operator, not a commodity. HOW TO APPLY: APPLY HERE: www.caliberworkforce.com/aicareers Complete your application through our platform. The process includes a behavioral assessment that matches you to the right role and the right client. No generic applications. No guessing. If you're ready to be placed, not just hired, apply now. www.caliberworkforce.com/aicareers

top_companies.summary: We're hiring a Junior Virtual Assistant to support Grace Inspired Life — an Amazon Influencer brand built around authentic product reviews, affiliate content, and a growing niche media portfolio. This is an entry-level, long-term, full-time remote role (40...
top_companies.full_description: We're hiring a Junior Virtual Assistant to support Grace Inspired Life — an Amazon Influencer brand built around authentic product reviews, affiliate content, and a growing niche media portfolio. This is an entry-level, long-term, full-time remote role (40 hours/week) with a flexible schedule. Prior experience as a VA or in a similar remote support role is preferred. We're looking for someone organized, detail-oriented, and ready to grow with the business. You'll work directly with the creator to keep two core operations running smoothly: content publishing and blog management. Find us here: Website: graceinspired.life/ YouTube: www.youtube.com/@graceinspiredlife Amazon Storefront: www.amazon.com/shop/graceinspiredmoments Pinterest: www.pinterest.com/graceinspiredlife ABOUT GRACE INSPIRED LIFE Grace Inspired Life is a product review brand and Amazon Influencer channel focused on helping everyday shoppers make confident buying decisions. We create honest, conversion-focused content across YouTube, Pinterest, and a portfolio of niche blogs — part of a media business I've been building since 2000. This role is a foundational piece of what comes next, and we're building for the long term. HOW THIS ROLE WORKS — 30-DAY PAID TRAINING PERIOD All new hires begin with a paid 30-day training period. This is your opportunity to learn our systems, workflows, and standards — and for us to see how you work. At the end of 30 days, we'll make a final hiring decision based on your performance, reliability, and fit. Candidates who complete training successfully move into the full-time role. WHAT YOU'LL DO Priority 1 — Blog Management (most important) -Update and optimize existing blog posts on WordPress for readability, affiliate link accuracy, and conversion -Identify linkable products within posts and connect them to live Amazon affiliate links -Audit existing links — flag dead links, find replacement products on Amazon, and propose solutions -Work within Lasso (affiliate link management plugin) — training provided, but familiarity is a plus Priority 2 — YouTube Publishing -Upload videos via Cha-Ching Automate to YouTube (US) and 12 International Storefronts. Training provided. -Set all uploads to draft mode initially; manually verify ASINs on international markets before publishing -Work through existing backlog of unpublished international videos -Flag "needs attention" videos from international storefronts for review -For each video: write title, description, and tags using VidIQ; set thumbnail, endscreen, and schedule -Target: 3 videos published per day -VidIQ training provided; thumbnail judgment matters — final output reviewed before publishing Growth Path As the business scales, this role will grow into helping train and manage additional VAs directly. QUALIFICATIONS Required: -WordPress experience — you should be comfortable inside a WordPress backend -Familiarity with both the Amazon Associates Program and the Amazon Influencer Program — including a working understanding of the Terms of Service for each -Amazon TOS compliance is non-negotiable in this role. You should already know: proper affiliate disclosure requirements, what content is and is not permitted, and what actions (such as screenshotting earnings or incentivizing clicks) are prohibited. -Candidates will be expected to demonstrate this knowledge before advancing to interview. -Highly organized and detail-oriented — this is the most important quality we're looking for -Excellent written and spoken English -Reliable internet (minimum 100 Mbps download / 100 Mbps upload) and a capable computer -Must install Hubstaff for time tracking upon hire -Available for a daily check-in at 7:30 AM EST A Plus (not required): -Experience with Lasso (affiliate link plugin) -Experience with VidIQ or similar YouTube optimization tools -Prior VA experience working with US-based content creators or influencer brands -Familiarity with Amazon Influencer Program or affiliate marketing content COMPENSATION & BENEFITS -$450/month during 30-day training period -$550/month starting salary (full-time) -Performance review at 6 months — strong performers move to $600/month -13th Month Pay in December (pro-rated if hired mid-year) -Paid Philippine holidays after training period plus an additional 5 PTO days (pro-rated if hired mid-year) -Full-time (40 hours/week) independent contractor agreement — this is not traditional employment. You will work as a self-employed contractor. -The initial contract covers the 30-day training period. Upon successful completion, you'll move to a 6-month renewable contract. Either party may end the agreement with 2 weeks written notice. -Flexible working hours with one required daily check-in -Long-term position with real growth opportunity — including managing other VAs as the team expands WORK HOURS -40 hours per week (Full Time) -Flexible schedule with a required daily check-in at 7:30 AM EST (8:30 PM PHT) HOW TO APPLY Before applying, please note: -Your cover letter title must include our current Pinterest follower count. Find it here: www.pinterest.com/graceinspiredlife -Apply using exactly 10 Application Points (APs) Applications that do not follow both instructions above will not be reviewed. Please submit ALL of the following with your application: -Screenshot of your computer specs (system info clearly visible) -Screenshot of your internet speed from www.speedtest.net -Complete these 3 assessments and submit screenshots + result URLs: -16 Personalities Test: www.16personalities.com/free-personality-test — Include screenshot with result type and your Personal Test Results URL -Big Five Personality Test: www.truity.com/test/big-five-personality-test — Include screenshot with your trait scores visible -IQ Test (FSIQ): openpsychometrics.org/tests/FSIQ/ — Include screenshot of your final result page with the unique result URL visible, and paste the full URL in your message Before submitting, please read both of the following: -Amazon Associates Program Operating Agreement -Amazon Influencer Program Policies You will be asked to demonstrate basic knowledge of both during the interview process. Candidates who cannot speak to Amazon TOS will not advance. A short cover message that includes: Why you're a good fit for this role -Your experience with WordPress and/or Amazon affiliate content -Tools and software you're familiar with (Lasso, VidIQ, Canva, ChatGPT, Claude etc.) -Resume with prior work history (if applicable)

We are looking for a highly organized, results-driven Virtual Assistant to support lead generation, outreach, and client management. Responsibilities: * Research and pull qualified asset recovery leads from public records and databases * Verify and organize lead information * Conduct outbound cold calls and follow-up calls * Manage and update CRM pipelines daily * Track lead status and maintain accurate records * Schedule appointments and follow-up communications * Send emails, text messages, and outreach campaigns * Generate daily and weekly activity reports * Assist with administrative tasks and process improvement Requirements: * Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal) * Previous experience with cold calling and lead generation * Strong CRM experience (GoHighLevel, HubSpot, Salesforce, or similar) * High attention to detail and organization * Comfortable handling outbound calls and overcoming objections * Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment * Self-motivated and able to work independently Key Performance Indicators (KPIs): * Leads researched and entered per day * Calls completed per day * Qualified prospects generated * Appointments scheduled * CRM accuracy and follow-up completion rate

top_companies.summary: Company: Moon Media Location: Remote Type: Full-Time Working Hours: Monday-Friday, 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM EST Experience Level: Mid-Senior --- About Moon Media We're a fast-growing creative agency that helps brands dominate short-form content. Our clients include...
top_companies.full_description: Company: Moon Media Location: Remote Type: Full-Time Working Hours: Monday-Friday, 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM EST Experience Level: Mid-Senior --- About Moon Media We're a fast-growing creative agency that helps brands dominate short-form content. Our clients include companies with millions of followers, and our systems power the production and management of hundreds of videos every month. But we're not just building content. We're building the infrastructure behind it. At Moon Media, **Notion is the backbone of our operations.** From project management and client delivery to production tracking, internal dashboards, documentation, and workflows, nearly everything runs through our Notion workspace. As we continue to scale, we're looking for someone who can help us build the next generation of our internal operating system. If your first instinct when you see an inefficient process is, *"There's a better way to build this,"* we'd love to meet you. --- The Role As our **Notion Systems Specialist + Automation**, you'll be responsible for designing, building, maintaining, and continuously improving the systems that power Moon Media. You'll work directly with the Founder and Head of Operations to improve our Notion workspace, automate repetitive processes, and create scalable solutions that help the business operate more efficiently. This is not an IT support role or a traditional virtual assistant position. Instead, you'll become our internal systems expert, building the infrastructure that supports our operations as we continue to grow. --- What You'll Be Working On: Priority #1: Notion Systems This will be the primary focus of your role. You'll help us: * Maintain and improve our existing Notion workspace * Build new databases, dashboards, templates, and workflows * Design scalable systems for project management, production, and operations * Improve reporting and visibility across the business * Continuously optimize our internal operating system as we grow Priority #2: Automation & AI Once workflows are built inside Notion, you'll help automate them. This includes: * Automating repetitive operational tasks * Streamlining onboarding workflows * File and folder organization * Notifications and reminders * Connecting software platforms to eliminate manual work * Researching and implementing AI tools that improve efficiency Priority #3: GoHighLevel (Nice to Have) GoHighLevel experience is a bonus, but it is **not** the primary focus of this role. We already have our CRM and funnels in place. We're mainly looking for someone who can support GHL automations and integrations when needed. --- Responsibilities * Build and maintain advanced Notion workspaces, databases, dashboards, and templates * Design scalable workflows that improve operational efficiency * Create native Notion automations and recommend external automation opportunities * Build automations using Zapier, Make, n8n, or similar tools * Analyze existing processes and recommend smarter system solutions * Connect software platforms to eliminate repetitive manual work * Research and implement AI tools that improve business operations * Troubleshoot and maintain existing systems and integrations * Create documentation and SOPs for new systems and workflows * Work directly with leadership to turn ideas into scalable operational solutions * Continuously improve internal workflows as the company grows --- Requirements (Non-Negotiable) * Advanced experience with Notion, including databases, relations, rollups, formulas, templates, and workspace architecture * Strong systems thinking and process optimization skills * Experience building automations using Zapier, Make, n8n, or similar platforms * Ability to design scalable workflows instead of temporary fixes * Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities * Excellent organization and documentation skills * Comfortable learning new software and technologies quickly * Self-starter who can work independently and take ownership of projects --- Nice to Have * Experience with GoHighLevel * Experience working with APIs and webhooks * Experience with Claude or other AI tools * Experience building AI workflows or AI agents * Experience building systems for agencies or fast-growing startups --- Who This Role Is For This role is for someone who genuinely enjoys building systems and making businesses operate more efficiently. You love creating clean Notion workspaces, designing workflows, connecting software, and simplifying complicated processes. You're naturally curious, proactive, and always looking for ways to improve operations through better systems. You don't wait for problems to be assigned. You identify opportunities, recommend better solutions, and build systems that save time for everyone around you. --- Why This Role Matters: Everything our team does runs through our operational systems. The solutions you build will directly impact how efficiently Moon Media operates every single day. You'll help leadership spend less time on repetitive work and more time growing the business. You'll have ownership over our internal operating systems and play a key role in shaping how Moon Media scales over the coming years. --- HOW TO APPLY: If you're passionate about Notion + automation, and building systems that make businesses run better, we'd love to hear from you! Apply Here: catnip-peak-d94.notion.site/3813b9fa536580f5bda7d0a6c68670f4 --- **IMPORTANT:** We will only consider applicants who complete the Notion application form linked above. Please do NOT reply or apply through this posting, as applications submitted here will not be reviewed.

top_companies.full_description: Member Success & Enrollment Coordinator About Us Boss Builder Academy is a growing online business education and entrepreneur community helping people build businesses, create multiple income streams, leverage AI and automation, improve their finances, and create more freedom in their lives. We are looking for a highly organized, proactive, and people-focused team member to help support our community members, follow up with leads, and ensure a world-class experience throughout the enrollment process. This is not a traditional virtual assistant position. We are looking for someone who enjoys helping people, building relationships, staying organized, and making sure nothing falls through the cracks. Responsibilities Include: Lead Follow-Up Follow up with leads via WhatsApp, SMS, Facebook Messenger, email, and CRM Answer basic questions about programs and trainings Schedule appointments and strategy calls Follow up with webinar registrants Follow up with no-shows Follow up with inactive leads Maintain accurate CRM records Community Support Welcome new members Assist with onboarding Approve member requests Start conversations inside the community Encourage engagement and participation Celebrate member wins and testimonials Support members with basic questions Administrative Support Update spreadsheets and tracking documents Maintain organization inside our systems Assist with project management tasks Document processes and SOPs when needed Required Skills Excellent English communication Strong attention to detail Highly organized Reliable internet connection Positive attitude Strong follow-up skills Ability to work independently Comfortable learning new software Bonus Skills GoHighLevel WhatsApp Communities Facebook Groups Skool Communities Appointment Setting Customer Success Digital Marketing AI Tools What Success Looks Like You will be successful in this role if: Leads receive timely follow-up Appointments are consistently booked Members feel welcomed and supported Community engagement increases No prospect or member falls through the cracks Application Instructions To apply, answer the following: Tell us about yourself. Why are you interested in this role? Describe your experience with customer support, community management, appointment setting, or enrollment. What CRM systems have you used? What is your internet speed? What are your normal working hours? What is your favorite business or personal development book and why? Record a 2-3 minute video introducing yourself. IMPORTANT: Begin your application with the phrase: "I Build Relationships." Applications that do not follow this instruction will not be considered.

top_companies.full_description: B2B Business Development Manager – Lead Generation Full-Time | Performance Bonuses | Long-Term Role Overview We are hiring a B2B Business Development Manager to generate qualified leads through LinkedIn outreach, cold email campaigns, and outbound calling. A Contact Marketers LLC has over 20 years of experience providing marketing, call center, virtual assistant, and BPO solutions to businesses across the United States. Our services help companies increase efficiency, reduce costs, and scale operations with reliable support teams. The primary objective of this role is to connect with business owners and decision-makers and generate opportunities for our call center, virtual assistant, and BPO services. This role combines lead generation, outreach strategy, and sales communication. The ideal candidate understands modern outbound strategies and is comfortable using outreach tools to consistently generate B2B leads. This is a full-time, long-term opportunity with performance-based bonuses tied to results. Key Responsibilities Lead Generation & Outreach * Generate B2B leads through: * LinkedIn outreach * Cold email campaigns * Cold calling * Identify and engage business owners and decision-makers * Build targeted prospect lists * Follow up consistently to create new opportunities * Schedule qualified meetings for the sales team Outbound Strategy * Develop messaging that generates responses and meetings * Test outreach approaches and improve performance * Identify industries that benefit from call center, VA, and BPO services * Continuously improve outreach results Phone & Sales Communication * Confidently communicate with prospects by phone * Introduce services and identify business needs * Build rapport with potential clients * Help move prospects into the sales pipeline Helpful Experience Familiarity with outreach and prospecting tools is helpful but not required. Examples include: LinkedIn Outreach Tools * LinkedIn Sales Navigator * Expandi * Dripify * Waalaxy * Meet Alfred Cold Email Platforms * Instantly * Smartlead * Lemlist * Mailshake * Reply.io * Apollo CRM & Prospecting Tools * HubSpot * Salesforce * Pipedrive * ZoomInfo * Lusha Understanding modern multi-channel outreach, personalization, and follow-up strategies is beneficial. Requirements * Experience in B2B lead generation, business development, or outbound sales * Experience with LinkedIn outreach, cold email, or cold calling * Strong written and verbal communication skills * Comfortable speaking with business owners and decision-makers * Organized and results-driven Compensation & Opportunity * Full-time role * Long-term opportunity * Performance-based bonuses tied to meetings and opportunities generated * Work with an established company with 20+ years of industry experience * High-impact role with growth potential Ideal Candidate * Experienced in outbound lead generation or business development * Comfortable using LinkedIn, email outreach, and phone outreach * Familiar with modern outreach tools and strategies * Strong communicator and relationship builder * Motivated by performance incentives * Focused on generating measurable results

The ideal candidate is professional, personable, highly organized, and possesses outstanding communication skills. As a Legal Liaison, you will represent our organization while supporting legal industry initiatives and collaborating with law firms, attorneys, legal service providers, and legal organizations throughout the United States. No court appearances, legal representation, or legal advice are required. RESPONSIBILITIES * Serve as a Legal Liaison for legal industry initiatives. * Communicate professionally with lawyers, attorneys, law firms, legal organizations, and industry stakeholders. * Coordinate meetings, communications, and follow-up activities. * Maintain accurate documentation and internal records. * Perform additional responsibilities as assigned. REQUIREMENTS * Licensed Lawyer / Attorney in the Philippines. * Juris Doctor (JD) or Bachelor of Laws (LLB) with admission to the Philippine Bar. * Excellent verbal and written English communication skills. * Outstanding interpersonal and professional communication skills. * Professional phone presence. * Strong organizational and time management skills. * Must be available to work full-time during U.S. business hours. * Reliable high-speed internet connection and a quiet remote workspace. PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS * Experience in private practice, litigation, law firm operations, legal technology, legal services, or legal administration is preferred. Experience in one or more practice areas such as personal injury, workers’ compensation, employment law, family law, immigration law, criminal defense, estate planning, probate, bankruptcy, business law, real estate law, or civil litigation is a plus. * Strong communication and management skills. * Comfortable working in a fast-paced professional environment. COMPENSATION & BENEFITS * Competitive monthly salary * Monthly performance bonuses * Full-time remote position (40 Hours per week) * Long-term opportunity * No court appearances or client representation required TO APPLY Please submit: * Your resume or CV * A short introductory video (1–2 minutes) * Your legal practice area or specialty (if applicable) * Your availability to work U.S. business hours * A brief summary explaining why you are interested in this opportunity

top_companies.full_description: Virtual Assistant / Success Manager StoicForge | Multi-Brand Ecommerce We Need Someone Who Keeps the Machine Running We're StoicForge - a growing ecommerce company running multiple brands in health, beauty, and personal care. We have the products, the customers, and the creative team. What we need now is someone who makes sure nothing falls through the cracks. You'll be the backbone of our operations - managing tasks, tracking projects, organizing data, and making sure every department stays on schedule. What You'll Be Doing Project & Task Management - Manage and maintain our ClickUp workspace - tasks, deadlines, statuses, assignments - Make sure every project moves through the pipeline on time - Flag bottlenecks and blockers before they become problems - Coordinate between departments - creative, operations, media buying Data & Organization - Maintain and update spreadsheets in Excel/Google Sheets - Organize and manage files across Google Drive - Create and update reports for the leadership team - Track key metrics and keep data clean and accurate Communication & Coordination - Summarize meeting notes and create action items - Coordinate schedules and deadlines across the team - Handle day-to-day communication with vendors, creators, and partners - Work directly with the ops manager and CEO on special projects Process Improvement - Identify inefficiencies and suggest better workflows - Help build and document SOPs - Set up automations where possible (Zapier, ClickUp) Who You Are You're obsessively organized. Your project board is always up to date. Your spreadsheets are clean. You move fast. You catch what others miss. You communicate clearly. You're coachable. You're a team player. StoicForge - Hiring What You Need Must have: - 1+ years experience as a virtual assistant, project coordinator, or operations assistant - Proficiency in ClickUp or JIRA - Strong Excel / Google Sheets skills - formulas, formatting, data management - Excellent English communication (written and verbal) - Reliable internet connection - Strong attention to detail Nice to have: - Experience in ecommerce or DTC brands - Familiarity with Google Drive, Slack, Zapier - Experience creating reports or dashboards This is NOT for you if: - You don't have experience with task management software - You get bored doing repetitive tasks - You're slow to respond and need constant follow-up - You're not comfortable with spreadsheets and data - You don't like a fast-moving, high-standards environment Compensation - Base: $500 - $700/month (depending on experience) - Hours: Full-time, Monday - Friday (Philippine time) - Monday Meeting Must be able to attend at 8:30 eastern time for 2 hours. - Growth path: As the company grows, your role expands. We promote from within. - Year End Bonuses - 1 Week Holiday A Year - 5 Sick Days A year How to Apply Send us: 1. A short intro - who you are and why this role interests you 2. Your experience - what tools you've used, what you've managed 3. One example of a time you caught a mistake or improved a process Keep it real. Show us how you think and how you work Please send it to Habib@covrix.com

top_companies.full_description: About the Role We are a U.S.-based real estate investment company seeking a Marketing Operations & Systems Manager to oversee the technology, marketing systems, lead flow, reporting, and CRM infrastructure that drives our acquisitions business. This role owns the operational side of lead generation and seller acquisition, including Salesforce (Left Main), direct mail campaigns, PPC lead management, dialers, reporting, automations, and vendor coordination. This is NOT a social media role, executive assistant position, customer service role, or general virtual assistant job. We are looking for someone who enjoys owning systems, managing technology, solving problems, coordinating vendors, and ensuring that marketing and lead flow operations run smoothly without constant supervision. Primary Responsibilities Marketing Operations & Lead Flow Manage the systems and processes supporting direct-to-seller marketing campaigns Monitor and maintain lead flow from marketing sources into Salesforce (Left Main) Coordinate with marketing vendors and internal team members Monitor lead routing, pipeline health, and conversion tracking Identify bottlenecks, errors, or inefficiencies and drive solutions CRM Management (Salesforce / Left Main) Administer and maintain Salesforce (Left Main) CRM Manage lead routing, opportunity stages, workflows, automations, and reporting Maintain CRM data quality and consistency Create and maintain dashboards, scorecards, and operational reports Coordinate with Salesforce and Left Main support resources when advanced assistance is required Document systems and workflows to reduce dependency on any one person Technology & Communication Systems Manage and support systems such as: Salesforce (Left Main) ReadyMode SmrtPhone RingCentral ActiveCampaign Zapier Google Workspace Other marketing and communication platforms Direct Mail & Marketing Coordination Coordinate direct mail campaigns Assist with PPC lead management and tracking Monitor campaign performance and lead sources Coordinate list management and marketing data Ensure marketing campaigns are executed accurately and on schedule Vendor & Team Coordination Coordinate with virtual assistants, cold callers, and vendors Assist with onboarding and system training Ensure team members are properly utilizing company systems Track projects and system-related tasks through completion Required Qualifications Strong CRM management experience Experience managing business systems and software platforms Experience with reporting, dashboards, and data management Strong organizational and project management skills Excellent written and verbal English communication Ability to learn new systems quickly Ability to work independently and solve problems without constant oversight Strongly Preferred Experience Salesforce CRM administration Salesforce (Left Main) Real estate investing, wholesaling, acquisitions, brokerage, or property management experience Lead generation and marketing operations Workflow automation Virtual team management Software Experience Preferred Salesforce (Left Main) ReadyMode SmrtPhone RingCentral ActiveCampaign Zapier Google Workspace Direct experience with every platform is NOT required. However, candidates must demonstrate strong systems management skills and the ability to learn and administer new software quickly. What This Role Is NOT Not a social media manager Not a content creator Not a sales position Not a call center role Not a general virtual assistant position Not an executive assistant role Compensation Full-Time (40 hours per week) $8-$12 USD per hour depending on experience and qualifications Long-term growth opportunity Potential for increased responsibilities and compensation as the company grows Application Instructions Please answer the following questions: Describe your experience administering Salesforce, Left Main, or another CRM platform. top_companies.summary: Full-Time | Remote | Philippines | UK Hours Salary: Competitive (Based on Experience) Hours: 40 hours per week Location: Remote (Philippines) Working Hours: UK Time (Flexibility required for major sporting events and campaigns) About Us Kwackers Kitchen &...
top_companies.full_description: Full-Time | Remote | Philippines | UK Hours Salary: Competitive (Based on Experience) Hours: 40 hours per week Location: Remote (Philippines) Working Hours: UK Time (Flexibility required for major sporting events and campaigns) About Us Kwackers Kitchen & Sports Bar is one of Southampton's highest-rated family-friendly restaurant sports bars, combining incredible comfort food, live sport and unforgettable experiences. We're not just another chicken restaurant. We create moments. Families celebrate birthdays with us. Friends come together for football. Customers visit us for the atmosphere as much as the food. Our ambition is to become one of the UK's most recognised independent restaurant brands online. And we're looking for someone exceptional to help us get there. This Is NOT a Typical Social Media VA Role We are NOT looking for someone who: Wants free food and a fun social media job Simply enjoys making videos Chases followers and likes Posts random content without strategy Cannot explain why content performs Doesn't understand business and revenue Needs constant direction We've hired those people before. They created content. They didn't create growth. This Role Is Different We are looking for a: Content, Community & Growth Manager (VA) Your mission is simple: Use social media to help grow our business. That means: More customers More restaurant bookings More website traffic More customer data More repeat visits More people talking about Kwackers More revenue Every piece of content should have a purpose. Every week should show measurable progress. What You'll Be Doing Content Creation Create TikTok and Instagram Reels Edit short-form videos Create engaging graphics and stories Produce content around: Food Matchdays Customer reactions Behind the scenes Team personalities Family experiences Community events Promotions and offers Trend Research Monitor TikTok and Instagram trends daily Identify trending sounds and formats Research competitors Bring new ideas every week Recommend experiments and campaigns Content Strategy Build monthly content calendars Plan campaigns around sporting events and promotions Develop repeatable content series Create ideas that increase reach and customer engagement Community Management Respond to comments and messages Encourage user-generated content Engage with our followers Build relationships with our online community Growth & Marketing Support Help increase restaurant footfall Help increase bookings Support email and customer database growth Support loyalty campaigns Help increase repeat visits Assist with promotional campaigns and launches Data & Reporting Responsibilities This is one of the most important parts of the role. You MUST be obsessed with data. Every week you will provide a performance report including: Content Produced Number of videos created Number of posts published Number of stories published Community engagement activities Performance Metrics Reach Views Watch time Retention Shares Saves Engagement rate Follower growth Business Metrics Website visits Booking enquiries Email sign-ups Customer database growth Campaign performance Revenue opportunities generated Insights What worked What didn't work Why it happened Competitor activity Emerging trends Experiments conducted Recommendations for next week You must be able to answer: "How did our content help grow the business this week?" Required Skills Social Media Platforms TikTok Instagram Reels YouTube Shorts Facebook Canva CapCut Meta Business Suite Content Skills Video editing Storytelling Hook creation Copywriting Graphic design Trend spotting Content planning Analytical Skills Excel or Google Sheets Dashboard reporting KPI tracking Trend analysis Performance reporting A/B testing Data interpretation Commercial Understanding You don't need restaurant experience, but you must understand: Marketing Customer psychology Sales Promotions Lead generation Brand building How content influences buying decisions The Type of Person We Want You are: Creative Commercially minded Curious Highly organised Self-motivated Reliable Accountable Ambitious Data-driven Proactive A problem solver Interested in building a long-term career Someone who thinks like a business owner Bonus Points If You Have Experience With Hospitality or restaurant marketing Sports brands Community management Email marketing Google Business Profile SEO AI tools ChatGPT Social listening tools Analytics dashboards Key Performance Indicators (First 90 Days) Month 1 Understand our brand and customers Complete social media audit Create content strategy Build reporting dashboard Create content calendar Month 2 Establish posting consistency Launch testing programme Improve engagement metrics Identify winning content themes Month 3 Build repeatable content systems Demonstrate measurable growth Produce insights and recommendations Show evidence that content is contributing to business objectives To Apply Please answer ALL of the following questions: Tell us about yourself and why this role interests you. What social media accounts have you grown? What were the results? Please share links to content you have created. Explain a piece of content that performed exceptionally well. Why did it work? Explain a piece of content that failed. Why did it fail and what did you learn? Which restaurant brands do you think are doing an amazing job on TikTok and Instagram? Why? If you had only an iPhone and £0 advertising budget, how would you help increase restaurant sales over the next six months? Create a simple weekly report template that you would present to management. Record a short video (maximum 3 minutes) explaining why you are the right person for this role.

top_companies.summary: Content, Creative & Operations Support — for a Growing Singapore-based Digital Agency In plain terms: a hands-on, do-a-bit-of-everything marketer — copywriting-led, with design, video, and light ops support — who helps a lean agency run and grow. Full-Time •...
top_companies.full_description: Content, Creative & Operations Support — for a Growing Singapore-based Digital Agency In plain terms: a hands-on, do-a-bit-of-everything marketer — copywriting-led, with design, video, and light ops support — who helps a lean agency run and grow. Full-Time • Remote • Long-Term Career Opportunity SGD600/month (probation) ? SGD800/month (on confirmation), with progression to SGD1,000–1,200 based on competency Reports directly to the Founder. You'll join a lean core team — Founder, Executive Assistant, and you — with a designer and freelance specialists supporting the work. ABOUT US Meander Digital is the digital marketing partner of choice for founder-led and expert-led service-based businesses. We help our clients rise above their competition and become recognised in the marketplace for their expertise through timeless sales and marketing strategies. Our work spans direct response advertising (performance marketing), lead generation, personal branding, and content marketing. We run lean by design. Our core team is small — the Founder, an Executive Assistant, and you — supported by a trusted network of freelance specialists. We believe that in an AI-enabled world, a capable, cross-functional operator can create the kind of leverage that used to require several separate hires. We are not looking for someone to stay inside one narrow job scope. We are looking for a T-shaped marketer — someone with real depth in one craft and the range to contribute across many — who enjoys making themselves useful across the business and quietly makes the whole team more effective. "A jack of all trades is a master of none, but oftentimes better than a master of one." That, in one line, is who we're looking for. THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF… - You only want to specialise in one function and have no interest in learning adjacent skills. - You instinctively say "that's not my job" rather than "what do I need to learn to move this forward?" - You wait for instructions instead of looking for problems to solve. - You dislike standard operating procedures, documentation, and organised systems. - You treat AI-generated work as a finished product. - You are looking for a short-term stepping stone before your next opportunity. - You become stressed when priorities change in a fast-moving agency environment. YOU'LL THRIVE HERE IF YOU ARE… - A T-shaped marketer — broad across many disciplines, with real depth in at least one. For this role, your deepest craft is copywriting and content; graphic design and short-form video are functional adjacent skills. (Our designer owns final polish; you'll collaborate with them when assets need it.) - AI-enabled and resourceful — you use modern AI tools to work across research, copy, design, and video at a level that used to require several people. - Someone with real taste and an eye for design — you know what "good" looks like, even when you're not the one polishing it. - A trend-spotter — you keep a close pulse on content and ad formats, and can tell what's working right now versus what's losing steam. - High ownership — you ask "what do I need to learn to move this forward?" rather than "that's not my job." - Someone who communicates with maturity and emotional intelligence — able to build trust with clients, teammates, and partners from different cultures and backgrounds. - Reliable and consistent — people know they can depend on you. - Naturally organised and enjoy creating order. - Comfortable switching between creative work and operational work. YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES Content & Marketing Support - Conduct audience, competitor, and industry research - Draft AI-assisted ad copy, emails, landing pages, and social media content - Set up and launch Meta ads campaigns (campaign optimisation stays with the Founder/media buyer) - Repurpose long-form content into short-form assets - Build and maintain swipe files and research libraries Creative Production (to a functional standard — our designer owns final polish) - Create and edit graphics in Canva - Resize and adapt existing ad creatives - Edit short-form videos using CapCut or equivalent software - Generate and refine AI-generated images where appropriate - Collaborate with our designer when an asset needs a higher level of polish Operations & Coordination (a supporting role — our Executive Assistant owns this area) - Help coordinate workflow between internal team members and freelancers - Work alongside the Executive Assistant — not in place of her — as the subject-matter/technical point of contact for team members, freelancers, and clients on marketing and creative work, keeping communication clear and timely (the Founder owns client strategy and decisions) - Support the Executive Assistant in following up on outstanding tasks and commitments, with firmness and tact, keeping projects moving without unnecessary friction - Help maintain clear communication across a geographically distributed team spanning Singapore, the Philippines, Indonesia, and Malaysia - Help track deliverables and keep projects moving forward - Maintain organised file structures and digital assets - Contribute to SOPs, checklists, and internal documentation Marketing the Business (our own agency marketing and the founder's personal brand) - all_jobs_for_company.summary: Content, Creative & Operations Support — for a Growing Singapore-based Digital Agency In plain terms: a hands-on, do-a-bit-of-everything marketer — copywriting-led, with design, video, and light ops support — who helps a lean agency run and grow. Full-Time •...
all_jobs_for_company.full_description: Content, Creative & Operations Support — for a Growing Singapore-based Digital Agency In plain terms: a hands-on, do-a-bit-of-everything marketer — copywriting-led, with design, video, and light ops support — who helps a lean agency run and grow. Full-Time • Remote • Long-Term Career Opportunity SGD600/month (probation) ? SGD800/month (on confirmation), with progression to SGD1,000–1,200 based on competency Reports directly to the Founder. You'll join a lean core team — Founder, Executive Assistant, and you — with a designer and freelance specialists supporting the work. ABOUT US Meander Digital is the digital marketing partner of choice for founder-led and expert-led service-based businesses. We help our clients rise above their competition and become recognised in the marketplace for their expertise through timeless sales and marketing strategies. Our work spans direct response advertising (performance marketing), lead generation, personal branding, and content marketing. We run lean by design. Our core team is small — the Founder, an Executive Assistant, and you — supported by a trusted network of freelance specialists. We believe that in an AI-enabled world, a capable, cross-functional operator can create the kind of leverage that used to require several separate hires. We are not looking for someone to stay inside one narrow job scope. We are looking for a T-shaped marketer — someone with real depth in one craft and the range to contribute across many — who enjoys making themselves useful across the business and quietly makes the whole team more effective. "A jack of all trades is a master of none, but oftentimes better than a master of one." That, in one line, is who we're looking for. THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF… - You only want to specialise in one function and have no interest in learning adjacent skills. - You instinctively say "that's not my job" rather than "what do I need to learn to move this forward?" - You wait for instructions instead of looking for problems to solve. - You dislike standard operating procedures, documentation, and organised systems. - You treat AI-generated work as a finished product. - You are looking for a short-term stepping stone before your next opportunity. - You become stressed when priorities change in a fast-moving agency environment. YOU'LL THRIVE HERE IF YOU ARE… - A T-shaped marketer — broad across many disciplines, with real depth in at least one. For this role, your deepest craft is copywriting and content; graphic design and short-form video are functional adjacent skills. (Our designer owns final polish; you'll collaborate with them when assets need it.) - AI-enabled and resourceful — you use modern AI tools to work across research, copy, design, and video at a level that used to require several people. - Someone with real taste and an eye for design — you know what "good" looks like, even when you're not the one polishing it. - A trend-spotter — you keep a close pulse on content and ad formats, and can tell what's working right now versus what's losing steam. - High ownership — you ask "what do I need to learn to move this forward?" rather than "that's not my job." - Someone who communicates with maturity and emotional intelligence — able to build trust with clients, teammates, and partners from different cultures and backgrounds. - Reliable and consistent — people know they can depend on you. - Naturally organised and enjoy creating order. - Comfortable switching between creative work and operational work. YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES Content & Marketing Support - Conduct audience, competitor, and industry research - Draft AI-assisted ad copy, emails, landing pages, and social media content - Set up and launch Meta ads campaigns (campaign optimisation stays with the Founder/media buyer) - Repurpose long-form content into short-form assets - Build and maintain swipe files and research libraries Creative Production (to a functional standard — our designer owns final polish) - Create and edit graphics in Canva - Resize and adapt existing ad creatives - Edit short-form videos using CapCut or equivalent software - Generate and refine AI-generated images where appropriate - Collaborate with our designer when an asset needs a higher level of polish Operations & Coordination (a supporting role — our Executive Assistant owns this area) - Help coordinate workflow between internal team members and freelancers - Work alongside the Executive Assistant — not in place of her — as the subject-matter/technical point of contact for team members, freelancers, and clients on marketing and creative work, keeping communication clear and timely (the Founder owns client strategy and decisions) - Support the Executive Assistant in following up on outstanding tasks and commitments, with firmness and tact, keeping projects moving without unnecessary friction - Help maintain clear communication across a geographically distributed team spanning Singapore, the Philippines, Indonesia, and Malaysia - Help track deliverables and keep projects moving forward - Maintain organised file structures and digital assets - Contribute to SOPs, checklists, and internal documentation Marketing the Business (our own agency marketing and the founder's personal brand) - Help publish case studies and keep our website current - Support email marketing, social media content, and lead generation initiatives - Turn the founder's ideas, talks, and raw recordings into publishable assets — LinkedIn content, long-form articles, video, podcast repurposing - Provide research and presentation support for thought-leadership initiatives Internal Projects & Documentation - Help move internal projects from idea to implementation — SOP creation, AI implementation, knowledge base development, workflow optimisation - Document key workflows so institutional knowledge no longer sits with only one person - Support small internal experiments and strategic initiatives From time to time you'll also provide secondary support on meeting preparation and reporting or data consolidation. You are not expected to replace specialists — you're expected to become competent enough to provide continuity when required. WORKING ENVIRONMENT Fully remote, full-time, with fixed hours of 9am–6pm Singapore time. If you're based in the Philippines, Indonesia, or Malaysia, that's regular daytime hours — we share a similar time zone. Collaborative work with our international core team and a trusted network of freelance writers, designers, and specialists across Singapore, the Philippines, Indonesia, and Malaysia. A dynamic workload — some days are quieter, others need more hands-on support as priorities shift in a fast-moving agency. Occasional travel to Singapore may be required. If so, your flights and accommodation are covered — so be ready to hop on a plane now and then. top_companies.summary: Virtual Executive Assistant to the CEO Part-Time and Full-Time Opportunities Available About the Role Brand M3dia is seeking a highly organized, proactive, and tech-savvy Virtual Executive Assistant to support our CEO in managing day-to-day operations...
top_companies.full_description: Virtual Executive Assistant to the CEO Part-Time and Full-Time Opportunities Available About the Role Brand M3dia is seeking a highly organized, proactive, and tech-savvy Virtual Executive Assistant to support our CEO in managing day-to-day operations, communications, and strategic initiatives. As a company specializing in interactive kiosks, custom software solutions, AI-powered technologies, digital signage, and robotics, we are looking for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment and can leverage modern technology to improve efficiency and productivity. Key Responsibilities Calendar Management Schedule, coordinate, and manage the CEO's appointments, meetings, and commitments. Ensure optimal use of the CEO's time and maintain an organized calendar. Communication Management Manage incoming and outgoing communications, including emails, phone calls, LinkedIn messages, and social media inquiries. Draft professional correspondence on behalf of the CEO when required. Staff Coordination Communicate with team members on behalf of the CEO. Delegate tasks as directed, follow up on deliverables, and ensure accountability. Document & Presentation Preparation Create, edit, proofread, and organize reports, presentations, proposals, and business documents. Ensure all materials meet company standards and executive expectations. Meeting Support Prepare agendas, reports, and supporting documents. Take notes, track action items, and ensure follow-up on commitments. Travel Coordination Arrange domestic and international travel, accommodations, transportation, and itineraries. Project Assistance Conduct research, gather data, summarize findings, and prepare recommendations to support executive decision-making. Assist with special projects and operational initiatives. Expense Management Track expenses and organize receipts. Prepare expense reports and ensure accurate documentation. AI & Technology Support Utilize AI tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Otter.ai, and similar platforms to improve productivity and streamline workflows. Assist with AI-powered research, content drafting, meeting summaries, process documentation, and automation initiatives. Stay current with emerging AI technologies and recommend ways to improve operational efficiency. Qualifications Required Proven experience as a Virtual Executive Assistant, Executive Assistant, Operations Coordinator, or similar role supporting senior leadership or C-level executives. Excellent organizational and time management skills. Strong written and verbal English communication skills. Ability to manage multiple priorities with minimal supervision. High level of professionalism and discretion when handling confidential information. Strong attention to detail and follow-through. Technical Skills Experience using productivity and collaboration tools such as: Zoho Basecamp Calendly Otter.ai ScribeHow Google Workspace Microsoft Office Suite Project management tools AI Experience (Preferred) Experience using AI tools for business productivity, research, writing assistance, meeting management, workflow automation, or administrative support. Ability to effectively prompt AI systems and evaluate AI-generated outputs. Familiarity with AI-powered productivity tools is highly desirable. IT experience a huge plus Nice to Have Experience working in technology, software, digital signage, robotics, AI, or related industries. Project coordination or operations experience. Experience supporting founders, executives, or entrepreneurs in fast-growth companies. Working Conditions Remote position. Main working hours: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST (Canada). Must have a reliable internet connection and dedicated workspace. Must have access to a computer capable of supporting modern business applications. Flexibility to accommodate urgent requests outside standard business hours when necessary. What We Offer Competitive compensation based on experience. Performance-based bonuses and incentives. Opportunity to work directly with an innovative CEO and leadership team. Exposure to cutting-edge projects involving AI, digital signage, interactive kiosks, software development, and robotics. Long-term growth opportunities within a rapidly expanding technology company. Application Process Interested candidates should submit: Updated Resume/CV Cover Letter References Relevant Work Samples (if applicable) A short 1-minute video introduction telling us about yourself, your relevant experience, and why you're interested in joining Brand M3dia. Please also indicate: Your experience supporting executives or business owners. Your experience using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Copilot, Otter.ai, etc.). Examples of how you have used AI to improve productivity or workflow efficiency. Your availability and salary expectations. *Please note that only applicants who have carefully followed all application instructions and submitted the required information will be considered for the next stage of the hiring process. Brand M3dia is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes candidates from all backgrounds to apply. Website: www.BrandM3dia.com

top_companies.summary: We are hiring an Experienced Sales, Marketing & Customer Support Virtual Assistant. Please apply only if you have previous experience in sales, customer support, lead follow-up, customer communication, and working with US-based clients. This is not an...
top_companies.full_description: We are hiring an Experienced Sales, Marketing & Customer Support Virtual Assistant. Please apply only if you have previous experience in sales, customer support, lead follow-up, customer communication, and working with US-based clients. This is not an entry-level position. We need someone who is confident, professional, organized, and experienced in handling customers through calls, emails, SMS, CRM, and follow-ups. You must be able to communicate clearly in English, manage customer conversations, follow up with leads, and help improve sales and customer retention. Main Responsibilities: -Handle customer support through calls, emails, SMS, and customer messages -Follow up with warm leads and help convert them into customers -Manage customer emails and messages professionally -Make outbound calls when needed -Support sales follow-up and customer retention -Follow up on failed payments and past-due customers -Help customers complete onboarding and required information -Manage and update CRM/GHL pipelines and customer records -Support email/SMS marketing campaigns -Track leads, follow-ups, sales activity, and customer issues -Provide daily updates and reports to the team -Help improve lead conversion, customer retention, and overall customer experience Required Experience: -Minimum 5 years of experience preferred -Experience working with US-based businesses or US clients -Strong spoken and written English -Previous sales experience is required -Customer support experience is required -Must be comfortable with calls, emails, SMS, and customer messages -Experience with GoHighLevel/GHL, CRM, email tools, SMS tools, or marketing tools is strongly preferred -Experience managing leads, follow-ups, pipelines, and customer records -Ability to work independently and follow company processes -Must be reliable, proactive, and detail-oriented Please do not apply if you do not have real experience in sales, customer support, lead follow-up, or client communication. Work Schedule: Full-time position Monday to Friday 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM EST 1 hour lunch break included Salary: Starting salary is ?25,000 Philippine Peso per month. Salary will be paid twice per month: -First half after the first 2 weeks -Second half after the next 2 weeks Training / Evaluation Period: There will be a required training and evaluation period during the first 2 weeks. During this time, we will review your communication, reliability, customer handling, CRM/GHL ability, sales follow-up skills, and ability to follow our company process. For highly experienced candidates with strong sales, customer support, and CRM/GHL experience, we may consider a shorter training/evaluation period. Salary Review & Bonus: After 90 days, we will review your performance. Salary may be increased based on reliability, sales performance, lead conversion, customer support quality, failed payment recovery, and overall contribution. There may also be performance bonuses depending on your sales results, lead conversion, and customer retention performance. Important: We are looking for someone serious, experienced, and long-term. If you are confident in your sales, customer support, communication, and follow-up skills, we want to speak with you. How to Apply: If you are comfortable with the role, schedule, and salary, please complete our application form here: api.yobbr.com/widget/form/3VFLcn5lZF2OF5lz5UUC After submitting the form, please book your interview slot here: api.yobbr.com/widget/bookings/klik-base-va-interview Only applicants who complete the form and book an interview will be reviewed.

top_companies.summary: We are hiring an assistant with proven experience and a strong background in wearing multiple hats. However, please note that this is not your usual VA role. We need someone who thinks beyond assigned tasks, takes initiative, and actively contributes to...
top_companies.full_description: We are hiring an assistant with proven experience and a strong background in wearing multiple hats. However, please note that this is not your usual VA role. We need someone who thinks beyond assigned tasks, takes initiative, and actively contributes to solving problems rather than just executing instructions. This is a full-time, long-term position for someone who is organized, coachable, proactive, and comfortable working in a fast-paced environment where priorities can shift quickly. ROLE OVERVIEW You will work directly with our Filipino executive assistant as a dependable partner, supporting the team across various areas of the business and day-to-day operations. This is best for someone who can show grace under pressure, help keep things organized, communicate clearly, and follow through on tasks. If you are resourceful, self-motivated, and confident in taking ownership of outcomes without being micromanaged, you may be the right fit for this role. top_companies.full_description: Now hiring Lead acquisition & management specialist Los Angeles, CA — Remote (PST hours required) · Full-time Compensation $1,000/mo Hours 8 AM – 5 PM PST Schedule Mon – Fri Timezone Pacific (PST) About the role We are a Los Angeles–based company looking for a motivated and detail-oriented Lead Acquisition & Management Specialist to join our team. In this role, you will be the first point of contact for potential clients — responsible for reaching out to prospects, qualifying leads, and ensuring every opportunity is tracked and followed up on within our CRM system. This is a high-communication role that requires professionalism, persistence, and strong organizational skills. Responsibilities Prospect, contact, and qualify inbound and outbound leads via phone, email, and other channels Conduct outreach calls professionally and persuasively to engage potential clients Log, update, and manage all lead activity within the company CRM system Track lead status, follow-up schedules, and pipeline progress Nurture warm leads through consistent and timely follow-up communication Coordinate with internal team members to hand off qualified leads as appropriate Provide regular updates on lead volume, status, and conversion activity Requirements Fluent in English with a neutral accent — clear, confident verbal communication is essential Prior experience in telemarketing, lead generation, or lead management Comfortable working with CRM software (e.g. GoHighLevel, HubSpot, Salesforce, or similar) Available to work Monday through Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Standard Time Reliable internet connection and a quiet, professional environment for calls Self-motivated, organized, and able to manage a high volume of leads without dropping the ball Nice to have Experience with SMS or email drip campaigns Familiarity with AI-assisted outreach tools or automation workflows Background in sales support or appointment setting Compensation & schedule This is a remote position. Pay is $1,000/month for qualified, experienced candidates. You must be available and working during Los Angeles local time (Pacific Standard Time), Monday through Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM. Punctuality and consistent availability are required. How to apply To be considered, please send the following: A brief introduction about yourself and your relevant experience Your resume or work history A short voice recording (30–60 seconds) introducing yourself — this helps us assess communication style and spoken English
