top_companies.summary: Oz Group | eXp Realty Help Build One of the Fastest-Growing Real Estate Teams in New Jersey Oz Group is on a mission to redefine agent growth and success in real estate. Led by Joe Oz, a member of Zillow's Agent Advisory Board, Oz Group is one of New Jersey's...
top_companies.full_description: Oz Group | eXp Realty Help Build One of the Fastest-Growing Real Estate Teams in New Jersey Oz Group is on a mission to redefine agent growth and success in real estate. Led by Joe Oz, a member of Zillow's Agent Advisory Board, Oz Group is one of New Jersey's fastest-growing real estate organizations, projected to exceed $100 million in annual sales volume. Through Zillow Flex opportunities, Zillow Seller Leads, world-class systems, and a culture of accountability and growth, we've built an environment where agents can thrive. As we continue to expand, we're looking for a highly driven Recruiting Specialist to help fuel the next phase of our growth. This is not a passive recruiting role. This is a performance-driven opportunity for someone who loves prospecting, building relationships, creating opportunities, and helping talented agents discover a better path to success. Your Mission The Recruiting Specialist is responsible for identifying, engaging, nurturing, and setting appointments with qualified real estate agents who fit the Oz Group growth profile. Your primary objective: Put qualified recruiting appointments on Joe Oz's calendar. Every activity in this role supports that outcome. What You'll Be Responsible For Agent Sourcing & Prospecting Source and identify qualified agents through Courted, Indeed, Zillow, social media, referrals, and industry networks Research agent production, growth trends, and market activity Build targeted recruiting lists and prospect databases Identify growth-minded agents who align with the Oz Group culture and vision Continuously expand the recruiting pipeline with high-potential talent Recruiting Outreach Conduct outbound recruiting calls Send text messages, emails, direct messages, and video messages Execute personalized outreach campaigns Build relationships with prospective agents Generate interest and schedule recruiting appointments Co-Broke Recruiting Review transaction history to identify high-performing co-broke agents Build relationships with agents already familiar with the Oz Group brand Add qualified prospects into recruiting campaigns and follow-up systems Convert existing industry relationships into recruiting opportunities Indeed Recruiting Manage Oz Group's Indeed Premier recruiting account Create, optimize, refresh, and monitor recruiting advertisements Conduct reverse prospecting and resume searches Source and engage qualified candidates Track recruiting performance and lead generation metrics Recruiting Marketing & Nurture Add all qualified prospects to Follow Up Boss and recruiting campaigns Execute long-term email, text, and follow-up nurture sequences Share agent success stories, testimonials, training highlights, and company updates Maintain database hygiene and segmentation Build familiarity, trust, and engagement over time Social Media Recruiting Engage with prospects across Instagram, Facebook, and LinkedIn Monitor agent activity and identify recruiting opportunities Like, comment, and interact strategically with target prospects Leverage Oz Group and Joe Oz content to nurture relationships Generate conversations and appointments through social engagement CRM & Pipeline Management Maintain accurate records in Follow Up Boss Track all conversations, appointments, and recruiting activities Update pipeline stages daily Ensure complete CRM compliance Manage appointment confirmations and follow-up tasks Reporting & Accountability Track recruiting KPIs and pipeline performance Maintain recruiting dashboards Report on recruiting funnel metrics and lead sources Analyze recruiting campaign effectiveness Continuously improve recruiting performance through data and insights What Success Looks Like At Oz Group, success is measured by outcomes—not activity. Daily Expectations 50+ Outbound Calls 50+ Text Messages 20+ Direct Messages 25 Voice-to-Voice Conversations 4 Recruiting Appointments Set Weekly Goals 20 Recruiting Appointments Set 10 Recruiting Appointments Met 100 Voice-to-Voice Conversations 5 New Agents Added to Pipeline 25 Prospects Added to Recruiting Campaigns Monthly Goals 80 Recruiting Appointments Set 40 Recruiting Appointments Met 4 Agents Signed 400 Voice-to-Voice Conversations 100% CRM Compliance Who We're Looking For You may be the perfect fit if you: Love connecting with people and building relationships Are confident making outbound calls and initiating conversations Have strong communication and persuasion skills Are highly organized and detail-oriented Thrive in a goal-driven environment Enjoy following systems and processes Are coachable, competitive, and growth-minded Take ownership of results Work well independently in a remote environment Have exceptional follow-through Preferred Experience Recruiting, talent acquisition, or business development experience Real estate recruiting experience (preferred but not required) CRM experience Social media prospecting experience Sales or outbound prospecting background We can teach systems. We cannot teach hunger, discipline, consistency, and a commitment to excellence. Why Join Oz Group? Growth Opportunity Join a team projected to exceed $100 million in annual sales volume and continue expanding across the market. Learn Directly From Joe Oz Work alongside one of the industry's most respected leaders and gain direct exposure to proven recruiting and growth strategies. Proven Systems You'll have access to established recruiting processes, technology, scripts, marketing assets, and onboarding systems. Remote Flexibility Work remotely while remaining connected to a high-performance, collaborative team. Career Advancement This role offers significant growth opportunities as the recruiting department expands. Impact Your work directly influences the growth of the company by helping attract top-performing real estate professionals. Why This Role Matters The Recruiting Specialist owns the top of the recruiting funnel and plays a critical role in building a predictable, scalable recruiting ecosystem for Oz Group. If you enjoy creating opportunities, building relationships, and helping ambitious professionals take their careers to the next level, this could be the opportunity you've been looking for. Apply today and help us build the future of Oz Group.

Responsibilities may include: Tracking project costs and budgets Monitoring purchase orders and material expenses Managing subcontractor documentation Assisting with lien waivers and vendor compliance Organizing contracts, permits, and insurance certificates Tracking project invoices and payment schedules Supporting job costing and project profitability reporting Required Qualifications Minimum 2 years of Executive Assistant experience Minimum 2 years of bookkeeping experience Experience supporting US-based companies Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal) Strong organizational and multitasking abilities High attention to detail Ability to work independently with minimal supervision Strong problem-solving and critical-thinking skills Professional, reliable, and trustworthy Required Software Experience Candidates should have experience with most of the following: QuickBooks Online (Required) Microsoft Excel Google Sheets Google Workspace Microsoft Office Adobe PDF Slack Zoom Dropbox or Google Drive Asana, Trello, ClickUp, or Monday.com Preferred Experience Construction bookkeeping Job costing Progress billing AIA billing Contractor invoicing Payroll support Budget management Vendor management CRM systems AI productivity tools (ChatGPT, Microsoft Copilot, Claude) Workflow automation (Zapier, Make.com) What We're Looking For We're looking for someone who: Thinks ahead and solves problems before they happen Loves organization and creating efficient systems Can prioritize multiple projects simultaneously Is dependable and accountable Takes ownership of their work Communicates proactively Maintains confidentiality and professionalism Works well under deadlines Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) Success in this role will be measured by: Accurate bookkeeping with minimal errors On-time vendor payments and invoicing Monthly financial reports completed on schedule Organized executive calendar and project tracking Accurate reconciliation of financial accounts Timely completion of assigned administrative tasks Efficient document management Strong communication with leadership and vendors Why Join Our Team? top_companies.summary: Job Title: Full-Time Growth & Marketing Specialist Company: Quiresoft Technologies Inc. Location: Remote (Philippines-based), working full-time on PST (Pacific Standard Time) hours Type: Full-time, long-term, exclusive (no other clients or side engagements)...
top_companies.full_description: Job Title: Full-Time Growth & Marketing Specialist Company: Quiresoft Technologies Inc. Location: Remote (Philippines-based), working full-time on PST (Pacific Standard Time) hours Type: Full-time, long-term, exclusive (no other clients or side engagements) About Us Quiresoft Technologies Inc. is a web design and digital marketing agency based in Langley, BC, serving clients across Metro Vancouver. We operate a portfolio of brands spanning agency services, real estate personal branding, and tech startups. We are looking for one exceptional, do-it-all growth person to become the engine behind all of them. This is not a single-task role. We want a startup growth operator who can wear many hats, take ownership, and help us build and scale multiple businesses at once. What You'll Do You will own and execute growth across our businesses, including: - Social media advertising: Plan, build, launch, and optimize paid campaigns on Meta (Facebook/Instagram) and other platforms. - Manage budgets, audiences, creative testing, and reporting against ROAS targets. - Email marketing: Build and run end-to-end email campaigns that generate real leads and conversions. Write copy, design sequences, segment lists, set up automations, and report on open/click/conversion performance. - Cold calling: Make outbound calls to prospects with confidence and professionalism. This requires an excellent English accent and communication skills, since you'll be speaking directly with North American business owners and clients. - CRM management: Build and manage pipelines, automations, and workflows in HighLevel (GoHighLevel). Keep our lead flow organized and our follow-up tight. - Startup growth: Help build and grow our startups (like QuickLinq) from the ground up. Develop go-to-market ideas, run experiments, find growth channels, and execute relentlessly. - Brand building: Support the development of the Mani Garcha real estate personal brand, including content, outreach, and lead generation. -General growth ownership: Treat our businesses like your own. Identify opportunities, propose strategies, and execute without needing to be micromanaged. What We're Looking For - Minimum 5+ years of hands-on experience in digital marketing, growth, or startup operations. - Proven, hands-on experience generating leads through email marketing (not just theory, real results). - Direct experience running paid ads on Meta with measurable outcomes. - Hands-on experience with HighLevel CRM. - Excellent spoken English with a clear, professional accent suitable for cold calling North American prospects. - Strong written English for email copy and client communication. - Ability to work independently, manage multiple businesses, and take full ownership. - Available full-time on PST hours, long-term, working exclusively for us. Preferred (Big Plus) - Experience working with North American realtors or in the real estate industry. - Experience supporting or growing early-stage startups. - Familiarity with digital agency workflows. Who You Are You're a self-starter who thrives on building things. You don't wait to be told what to do, you spot what needs doing and do it. You're comfortable juggling several brands at once, you communicate clearly, and you're in this for the long haul. You want to grow with us, not bounce to the next gig. The Role Offers A long-term, stable, full-time position with one company. The chance to own growth across multiple businesses and genuinely shape their direction. Direct work with the founder and real decision-making input. Room to grow as our businesses grow. To Apply Send your resume along with a short note covering: the lead-generation results you've driven through email marketing, the Meta ad campaigns you've run (with rough numbers), your experience with HighLevel, and any real estate or startup experience. Please include a short voice recording or be ready to do a quick call so we can hear your spoken English.

top_companies.summary: JOB TITLE: Full-Time Graphic Designer SHIFT: 8:20 AM EST – 4:20 PM EST (Monday–Friday) Note: The 8:20 AM EST clock-in time is strict and essential for this role. HOURS: 40 Hours per Week SALARY: $400 USD per Month ABOUT THE ROLE: We are a US-based digital...
top_companies.full_description: JOB TITLE: Full-Time Graphic Designer SHIFT: 8:20 AM EST – 4:20 PM EST (Monday–Friday) Note: The 8:20 AM EST clock-in time is strict and essential for this role. HOURS: 40 Hours per Week SALARY: $400 USD per Month ABOUT THE ROLE: We are a US-based digital marketing agency looking for a creative, forward-thinking Full-Time Graphic Designer to join our team. We need someone to handle our day-to-day Graphic Design needs, spanning both Print and Digital mediums. We highly prefer someone who can work comfortably and efficiently within Canva for regular digital assets, but you must still be fully proficient with Adobe software (like Photoshop and Illustrator) for complex design layouts. WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR: Highly Trainable: You absorb feedback quickly, adapt well to new workflows, and are always eager to learn and improve. Tech & AI Savvy: You lean into modern tools and are highly comfortable leveraging AI technology to optimize your design process and efficiency. Strong Communicator: Excellent English communication skills are required. We hold quick, daily meetings for project reviews where clear updates are crucial. WHAT YOU WILL DO: GRAPHIC DESIGN (PRINT & DIGITAL): You will handle all visual assets. This includes designing Print materials (flyers, menus, brochures with correct CMYK/bleeds) and Digital assets (social media posts, ad banners, thumbnails) using a mix of Canva and Adobe software. BRANDING: Ensure all designs match our brand guidelines. COLLABORATIVE REVIEW: Join daily meetings to present your work, take direction, and adjust designs based on team feedback. REQUIREMENTS: > Proficient in Adobe Photoshop and Illustrator (Mandatory), while also being highly comfortable working in Canva for design planning, presentations, collaborative work, and quicker tasks. > Proven experience in producing both high-quality print files and digital assets. > Comfortable utilizing AI technology within your creative and design workflows. > Good spoken and written English communication skills. > Reliable PC and Internet connection capable of running heavy design software and stable video calls smoothly. > Web Design Experience (Plus): Basic knowledge or experience designing and updating responsive website pages using WordPress and Elementor is a huge plus, though not mandatory. HOW TO APPLY: IMPORTANT: We will not review applications without a Portfolio and following the instructions. Please send a message with the Subject Line: "Designer Application" and answer these questions: > How many years of design experience do you have? > Are you comfortable and fast working within Canva for daily design tasks, while still being proficient in Photoshop/Illustrator? > How do you currently utilize AI technology or tools in your design or daily workflow? > Do you have any experience with WordPress and Elementor? (Remember, this is just a plus, not a requirement!) > Are you okay with the flat salary of $400 USD/month? > Are you fully able to commit to the strict shift of 8:20 AM EST to 4:20 PM EST, including the mandatory 8:20 AM clock-in? > We do quick daily meetings in English for project reviews. How comfortable are you with participating in these regular calls? LINK TO PORTFOLIO: (Must include Print and Digital design samples. Website design samples are a plus).

top_companies.summary: We’re looking for a motivated and results-driven Lead Generation Specialist to help grow our sales pipeline and expand our customer base. As a BDR, you’ll be on the front lines of our sales efforts, identifying potential clients, generating leads, and...
top_companies.full_description: We’re looking for a motivated and results-driven Lead Generation Specialist to help grow our sales pipeline and expand our customer base. As a BDR, you’ll be on the front lines of our sales efforts, identifying potential clients, generating leads, and nurturing opportunities to connect them with our solutions. Key Responsibilities: 1. Proactively research and identify potential customers in target markets. 2. Reach out to prospects via emails, LinkedIn, and other communication channels. 3. Qualify leads to assess fit and interest, ensuring alignment with our services. 4. Schedule meetings or product demos between qualified leads and Sales Development Representatives. 5. Maintain accurate records of lead interactions and update CRM systems accordingly. 6. Collaborate with the marketing and sales teams to execute campaigns and optimize lead generation strategies. 7. Stay up-to-date on industry trends and our product/service offerings to effectively communicate value propositions. Qualifications: - Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, or a related field (or equivalent experience). - 2 - 3 years of experience in sales, business development, or a similar role (entry-level candidates with strong communication skills and a hunger to learn are also encouraged to apply). - Excellent verbal and written communication skills. - Strong interpersonal skills and the ability to build rapport quickly. - Self-motivated, goal-oriented, and eager to exceed targets. - Proficiency in extracting data from LinkedIn Sales Navigator and other professional networks - Must have a well-optimized LinkedIn account with atleast a minimum of 300 connections that can be used for prospecting - Familiarity with CRM tools (e.g., Salesforce, HubSpot, PipeDrive) is a plus. - Comfortable with cold outreach and prospecting. Who we are: Acadium started with the belief that anyone, anywhere, should be able to get the skills and experience they need to start their career without barriers like price, schedule, or location getting in their way. Acadium gives anyone the tools, support, and mentorship they need to launch their dream career. Acadium is the only platform that provides real work experience, accessible to everyone. Acadium began in 2017 with a team of 3 co-founders: Richard Shaw, Marco Tundo, and Moe Abbas. Since then, they’ve attracted more than 120,000 student members and over 50,000 businesses to connect through the apprenticeship marketplace. Our team is growing and looking for people who are motivated, intelligent, and committed to making education accessible to join our team. What we value: Integrity - Be trustworthy in your actions Care - Treat your teammates and our community as you would want to be treated Curiosity - Ask questions. Always state your assumptions Tenacity - Persevere when times are tough Discipline - Be consistent in your actions Ambition - Aspire to become better every day Service -Serve your community to the best of your abilities. Interested applicants may send updated CVs and LinkedIn URLs with a minimum of 300 connections to jelly.saavedra@acadium.com Email Subject: [Adjective that describes you] B2B Lead Generation Specialist **Note: Only applicants who submit their resumes and LinkedIn URL will be evaluated.

positives: Modern AI/tooling: chatgpt, ai tools, capcut, canva

top_companies.summary: Employment Type: Full-time (40 hours/ week from 9 am to 5 pm M-F Pacific Standard Time Initial Engagement: 90-day performance-based contract with the opportunity to transition into a permanent full-time position based on results. Bonuses are available for...
top_companies.full_description: Employment Type: Full-time (40 hours/ week from 9 am to 5 pm M-F Pacific Standard Time Initial Engagement: 90-day performance-based contract with the opportunity to transition into a permanent full-time position based on results. Bonuses are available for demonstrated performance. About Us: We are a rapidly growing U.S.-based Applied Behavior Analysis (ABA) healthcare company serving children with Autism throughout California. Our mission is to build exceptional clinical teams so that more children can receive consistent, high-quality therapy. We are looking for an experienced Recruitment Marketing & Talent Acquisition Specialist who udnerstands that recruiting is both a sales and. marketing function - not simply posting jobs and waiting for applicants. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys building recruiting systems, creating marketing campaigns, generating passive candidates, and improving hiring processes through data and continuous optimization. What You Will Do: Talent Acquisition - Recruit U.S.-based healthcare professionals, including Board Certified Behavior Analysts (BCBAs) and Behavioral Technicians (BTs). -Build and maintain a strong pipeline of passive candidates. -Source candidates through multiple channels beyond job boards. -Screen applicants and coordinate interviews. -Manage candidate communication throughout the hiring process. -Build and maintain an organized applicant tracking system (ATS) Recruitment Marketing -Create and manage Meta (Facebook ) recruiting campaigns. -Develop recruiting funnels and landing pages. -Create engaging recruitment advertisements and contents. -Design graphics using Canva. -Edit short-form recruitment videos using CapCut. -Write compelling recruitment copy that attracts high quality candidates. -Assist with employer branding initiatives. Technology & Systems -Build and manage Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS) and CRM platforms -Utilize Google Workspace for documentation and reporting. -Leverage ChatGPT and other AI tools to improve recruiting efficiency. -Track recruiting metrics using spreadsheets and dashboards. Required Qualifications Applicants should have experience in MOST of the following: Recruiting -Recruiting U.S.-based professionals -Healthcare recruitment (preferred). -Passive candidate sourcing. -Candidate screening -Interview coordination -Building recruiting pipelines. Digital Marketing -Meta Ads Manager -Facebook Lead Ads -Recruiting Funnels -Landing page creation -Email marketing -Canva -CapCut -Copywriting Technology -Applicant Tracking System (ATS) -CRM Management -Google Workspace. -Chat GPT or AI productivity tools -Spreadsheet reporting and data analysis. What Success Looks Like Your performance will be measured by clear, objective KPIs, including: -Number of qualified BCBA leads generated each month. -Cost per qualified applicant. -Interview conversion rate -Offer acceptance rate. -Time-to-fill open positions. -Candidate response time -Recruiting pipeline health -Weekly recruiting reports and performance metrics. Who Will Thrive in This Role You are: -Highly organized and detail oriented -A proactive problem solver who takes ownership. -Comfortable working independently with minimal supervision -Data-driven and motivated by measurable outcomes. -Creative in finding new ways to attract top talent. -Passionate about building long-term recruiting systems rather than simply filling positions. Why Join Us? -Long term opportunity with a growing U.S. healthcare company. Stable, full time remote position. -Opportunity to build and own our recruitment marketing strategy. -Work closely with leadership and have a meaningful impact on company growth. -Be a part of our growth. Application Instructions: To be considered, please submit your resume AND a brief cover letter answering the following questions: 1. Describe a successful recruiting campaign you personally managed. 2. Have you managed meta recruiting ads? if yes, what were the results? 3.What Applicant Tracking Systems (ATR) have you used? 4. If hired, what would your first 30-day recruiting plan be? 5. Please provide links or examples of any landing pages, advertisements, recruiting campaigns, or marketing materials you have created. 6. Describe the most difficult U.S. position you successfully filled. How did you find qualified candidates, and how long did it take? Applicants who do not answer these questions may not be considered. PLEASE DO NOT USE CHATGPT WHEN COMPLETING YOUR APPLICATION RESPONSES.

top_companies.summary: We are looking for a highly skilled AI Video Creator who can help us create a large number of short-form videos for our travel app. This is a 1-week full-time project, starting ASAP. Salary: USD 100 for 1 week of full-time work. About Us We are InfoAlanya, a...
top_companies.full_description: We are looking for a highly skilled AI Video Creator who can help us create a large number of short-form videos for our travel app. This is a 1-week full-time project, starting ASAP. Salary: USD 100 for 1 week of full-time work. About Us We are InfoAlanya, a travel-tech startup building an app for tourists visiting Alanya, Turkey. Our app: iOS: apps.apple.com/dk/app/infoalanya-transfers-tours/id6759284605 Android: play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.hacertemiz.infoalanyamobile Tourists can use the app to book: Airport transfers Tours and activities Restaurants Clinics Beauty salons And more The Project We need to create many short-form videos for: TikTok Instagram Reels Facebook Reels YouTube Shorts The videos will mainly be about: Tours and activities in Alanya Restaurants How tourists can book through our app Why the app makes travel easier Travel tips and experiences in Alanya Important: This role is mainly about creating AI-generated videos, not only editing existing footage. You must be able to: Write strong prompts for AI video generation Generate realistic scenes with AI tools Create visuals that look natural and professional Combine AI clips into finished videos Add captions, music, sound effects and voiceover Make videos that are engaging from the first 3 seconds You Will Work With Our Marketing Team You will not work alone. Our marketing team will provide: Ideas Hooks Scripts Creative direction Feedback Your job is to turn these ideas into finished short-form videos that look professional and can be used on social media. Requirements We are looking for someone who: Has strong experience with AI video creation Is very good at writing detailed prompts Understands short-form video content Knows how to create TikTok/Reels style videos Can create strong hooks and good pacing Can work fast and meet deadlines Has a good eye for visuals, lighting, camera angles and storytelling Speaks good English You should know how to write prompts for: Scenes People Locations Camera movement Lighting Emotions Realistic travel situations Restaurant and tour content Experience with tools such as: Kling Runway Veo CapCut Pro Midjourney ChatGPT ElevenLabs Adobe Premiere Pro After Effects or similar tools is a big advantage. To Apply Please send: Your best short-form video portfolio. Examples of AI-generated videos you have created. Examples of prompts you have written for AI video generation. Which AI tools you use. How many finished videos you can create per day. When you can start. Please only apply if you are confident you can create professional AI-generated videos quickly. We are hiring immediately.

top_companies.full_description: Virtual Luxe Solutions is seeking a highly organized, proactive Real Estate Marketing & Operations Virtual Assistant to support a growing realtor in FL. This is a full-time, long-term opportunity for someone who thrives in real estate, loves structure, and takes ownership without needing constant reminders. We are not looking for a task-taker. We are looking for a partner in marketing & operations. About the Client Our client is a FL Realtor focused on growth, systems, and consistent marketing. They would love someone saavy with Social Media, AI and typical executive assistant support. Responsibilities - Marketing & Content Support - Create and schedule social media content using Canva, Airtable, FB, IG, etc. (Includes Reels, Video, Static posts, etc.) - Draft and manage monthly newsletters - Create buyer guides, seller guides, and listing marketing materials - Support email marketing campaigns - Maintain brand consistency across platforms - Assist with campaign planning and event promotions - Implement structured monthly marketing plans CRM & Database Management - Clean up and organize Follow Up Boss CRM - Tag, segment, and maintain database accuracy - Support website transition to AgentFire - Build and maintain automated workflows - Monitor engagement and suggest improvements Operations & Systems - Help finalize and implement listing and buyer systems - Document workflows and create simple SOPs - Organize Google Drive and shared documents - Support inbox organization and follow-up - Assist with lead follow-up coordination (ex: confirming pre-approvals, lender communication) Ideal Candidate You are: - Highly detail-oriented - Naturally proactive (you do not wait to be reminded) - Comfortable managing multi-step projects - Strong in written communication - Organized and systems-minded - Confident working independently - Able to give realistic timelines and meet them Preferred experience: - Real estate admin - Marketing support - Canva (required) - Experience implementing or cleaning up systems Tools You’ll Use - Canva (required) - Google Workspace - Flodesk (or similar email marketing tool) - Zoom Schedule - 40 hours per week - Monday–Friday - 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST Benefits - 5 Paid Time Off (PTO) days annually - After 90 Days - Paid holidays (Christmas, Thanksgiving, New Years Day and Independence Day) - 2 Floating holidays per year - Ongoing leadership support through Virtual Luxe Solutions - Structured onboarding and clear expectations To Apply Please email: - Resume - Brief introduction explaining why you are a strong fit - Subject Line: Real Estate Marketing VA Application – [Your Name]

I need a sharp, creative operator who can run my systems, use AI to do the heavy lifting, and deliver marketing that looks and reads great — without me checking every line. This is NOT a data-entry gig. This role is part-time with the desire to convert to full-time once training is complete. WHAT YOU'LL DO Produce SEO blog posts (new construction, VA loans, Texas suburbs) optimized for AI search + Google Create clean graphics and social content (Canva) Build and schedule email campaigns in MailerLite Keep my Google Business Profile updated + maintain KPI trackers Generate/send home value reports and follow-up emails to clients Occasionally fill contract templates (~1 hr/week) — I review and sign everything REQUIRED SKILLS Strong marketing instincts and a creative eye — your work doesn't look generic Fluent with MULTIPLE AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini) — you run a prompt, judge the output, and fix it Strong, natural written English — never robotic Follows instructions to the letter Detail-oriented, discreet, and reliable NICE TO HAVE US real estate experience, Lofty CRM, CloudCMA, or MailerLite Graphic design / short-form video skills Familiarity with US military / PCS relocation HOW TO APPLY (follow exactly — this is your first test) Start your message with "Sharp Hire." No keyword = instant delete. List the AI tools you use and what you use each for. Send ONE example of marketing content you made with AI, plus the prompt you used. Attach your DiSC test results as a PDF (free at 123test.com/disc-personality-test). One sentence: a time you followed a detailed process and nailed it.

This is a hands-on technical role for someone who can architect real solutions — not simply operate AI tools. The ideal contractor has a genuine software engineering background and can independently build, integrate, and scale automated workflows across our platforms. Key Responsibilities -Design, develop, and maintain automation systems and integrations across the company's operational platforms -Build and optimize workflows connecting tools such as CRMs, scheduling systems, payroll platforms, and communication channels -Apply AI/LLM capabilities (e.g., Claude, ChatGPT, or similar) within engineered systems — not as standalone tools, but as components of larger automated solutions -Identify manual or repetitive processes across departments and convert them into scalable, automated systems -Develop and maintain internal tools, scripts, and integrations using appropriate programming languages and frameworks -Document system architecture, workflows, and processes for maintainability and team visibility -Troubleshoot, monitor, and continuously improve existing automations and systems -Collaborate with leadership and operations teams to translate business needs into technical solutions AI Agent Development -Design and deploy AI agents, assistants, and workflow automations that support internal teams and client communications -Build retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems, knowledge bases, and AI-powered document processing workflows -Develop prompt engineering frameworks and testing methodologies to improve AI reliability and performance Security & Compliance -Implement security best practices for automation workflows and data handling -Ensure systems comply with applicable privacy and data protection standards -Manage access controls, permissions, and audit processes for automated systems Qualifications -Applicants should have a solid software engineering background. Experience using AI tools alone, without programming and systems development experience, is not sufficient for this role. -Demonstrated experience building systems, integrations, or automated workflows from the ground up -Strong proficiency in at least one modern programming language (e.g., Python, JavaScript/Node.js, or similar) -Experience with API integrations, automation platforms, and/or workflow orchestration tools -Working knowledge of applying AI/LLM tools within engineered systems and process design -Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work independently with minimal oversight -Clear written and verbal English communication skills -Experience in a remote, US-client-facing environment is a plus For interested candidates please submit the following: Resume Cover Letter Portfolio Introduction Video DISC personality test result (screenshot only) – www.123test.com/disc-personality-test/

top_companies.full_description: APPLY : docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfaJ5r-r9_3NSiesN0eT8j-HR0_3oIAwQ8AqqMpo5niIMS1Qw/viewform?usp=sharing&ouid=112704830944857851752 Project Management · Asana · Operations Management · Team Management · AI Tools · Prompt Writing · Task Delegation · Recruiting / Hiring · Remote Team Coordination · Workflow Automation Company: A boutique luxury fine-art photography studio in New York City (maternity, newborn & portrait; founded 2007, two locations). Studio name shared with shortlisted candidates. Type: Full-time, remote · Compensation: [insert range] Hours: 8-hour days. Live overlap with the owner 1:00–5:00 PM EST (your evening/overnight in PH); remaining hours flexible, your choice. Top 3 SKILLS Project Management Team / Workforce Management Operations Management Skill tags: Asana Task Delegation Process Improvement AI Tools (Claude, ChatGPT) Prompt Writing Recruiting / Hiring Remote Team Coordination Google Workspace Project Coordination Workflow Automation AI Automation Agent Building Workflow Automation The opportunity We're a 17-year-old boutique studio in an aggressive growth phase. The strategy is already written — repricing, local SEO recovery, CRM rebuild, content engine, recruiting. What we need is the person who runs it. Almost all execution flows through Claude (AI), dispatched as tasks in Asana. You'll be the operator who turns plans into shipped work, with AI as your execution engine and a small team of contractors underneath you. This is a high-autonomy seat. You won't be handed micro-tasks — you'll be handed objectives and trusted to drive them to done. What you'll do Break strategic plans into structured Asana tasks, sequence them, dispatch, and track every thread to completion. Operate Claude as your engine — write clear prompts, supply context, then QA and refine AI output before it ships. You're the judgment layer between the AI and the live business. Drive marketing execution: local SEO and Google Business Profile fixes, CRM email rebuild, blog/content pipeline, review automation, campaign rollout. Recruit and manage a small bench of contractors (link-building VA, retoucher, future hires). Light HR. Coordinate the tool stack: Webflow, Bookeo, Ahrefs, Google Search Console, Mailchimp, retouching tools. Report weekly: what shipped, what's blocked, what's next. Own outcomes, not activity. Who you are Engineering background (software/CS or technical). We want your systems thinking — you see a messy process and design the pipeline. Fluent, precise written English. Most of your work is written. Comfortable with AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT) and skilled at writing prompts that produce usable output. Project-management discipline — Asana or equivalent, and the habit of closing loops. Genuinely self-directed. You thrive working async and don't wait to be told what's next. Bonus: · HR/recruiting or team-lead experience · creative/photography studio background. Why this role is different You'll be operating a business almost entirely through AI — a genuinely modern operator seat with enormous leverage. The right person grows into a true second-in-command. To apply: Send a short note covering (1) a process or system you built and ran end-to-end, and (2) a specific example of getting real work done with an AI tool. Bullet points fine — we value clarity over polish. Shortlisted candidates complete a short paid trial task. APPLICATION LINK : APPLY : docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfaJ5r-r9_3NSiesN0eT8j-HR0_3oIAwQ8AqqMpo5niIMS1Qw/viewform?usp=sharing&ouid=112704830944857851752

top_companies.summary: GROWTH MARKETING LEAD — OUTBOUND, PAID ADS & GTM Full-time | Remote | Base + Variable | PST hours + weekends as needed ABOUT THIS ROLE You will join our outbound and paid acquisition team— finding the right people, reaching them fast, and converting attention...
top_companies.full_description: GROWTH MARKETING LEAD — OUTBOUND, PAID ADS & GTM Full-time | Remote | Base + Variable | PST hours + weekends as needed ABOUT THIS ROLE You will join our outbound and paid acquisition team— finding the right people, reaching them fast, and converting attention into pipeline. You will run Apollo, LinkedIn outreach, and IG/FB ad campaigns. You will also identify and pursue partnership opportunities with complementary tools, communities, and platforms that serve our audience. This is not a brand awareness role. This is a pipeline role. We measure success in demos booked, trials started, and partnerships closed — not impressions. If you need someone to hand you a strategy, this is not the right role. If you can look at a product, identify who needs it, find them, reach them, and close the loop — keep reading. WHAT YOU WILL OWN 1. Outbound Lead Generation - Outbound motion using Apollo.io - Build and manage prospect lists - Write email sequences, LinkedIn outreach messages, and follow-up cadences that get replies - Run personalized LinkedIn outreach campaigns: connection requests, DMs, InMail - A/B test subject lines, hooks, and calls to action continuously and report what moves the needle - Maintain a clean CRM pipeline with accurate stages, notes, and follow-up logic - Hit weekly activity targets: contacts added, sequences launched, replies generated, demos booked 2. Paid Advertising — Meta (IG + FB) - Build, launch, and manage Instagram and Facebook ad campaigns from scratch - Write ad copy and collaborate on creative direction — you understand what hooks work for a B2B finance audience - Set up proper campaign structure: awareness, retargeting, conversion layers - Monitor spend, CPL, CTR, and ROAS daily — optimize or kill underperforming ad sets fast - Track attribution from ad click to demo booked using available tools - Recommend budget allocation based on performance data, not gut feel 3. Competitor Research & Market Intelligence - Monitor the competitive landscape - Monitor competitor ads, landing pages, and content - Identify adjacent tools, communities, and platforms 4. Partnerships & BD Outreach - Identify and prioritize partnership targets: integrations, co-marketing, referral programs, community sponsorships - Run outreach to partnership targets using Apollo and LinkedIn - Manage the partnership pipeline from first contact to signed agreement handoff - Target: accounting firms, fractional CFO networks, Banks, PE/VC portcos, ERP and accounting software ecosystems 5. Copy & Messaging - Write all outbound copy: emails, DMs, ad creative, landing page updates, subject lines - Copy must be fluent, direct, and native-level English - Understand the value proposition deeply enough to write from the prospect's pain, not our features - Collaborate on landing pages and CTAs to ensure outbound traffic converts VARIABLE COMPENSATION — HOW YOU EARN MORE Salary is a mix of fixed and variable comp. We track outcomes automatically — demos booked, trials started, partnerships initiated — and pay monthly based on prior month results. A strong performer will meaningfully exceed base every month. WHAT WE REQUIRE - Proven Apollo.io experience: you have built lists, written sequences, and managed outbound campaigns that generated real pipeline. Show us results, not descriptions. - Proven Meta Ads experience: you have run IG and FB campaigns for a B2B product or service with measurable outcomes. Screenshots or case numbers required. - Exceptional English copy: written at a native level. We will test this. Robotic, templated, or ESL-patterned writing disqualifies immediately. - LinkedIn outreach experience: you have run personalized LinkedIn campaigns and can show reply rates - Research skills: you can build an ICP from scratch, identify where they live online, and map a market without being told how - Self-directed: you do not wait to be told what to do next. You identify the opportunity and execute. - Comfortable with performance accountability: you are tracked, your numbers are visible, and you are fine with that because your numbers are good - Full-time and exclusive — no other clients or side projects during work hours - PST availability: sync hours between 8am–midnight PST, weekends as needed - Minimum 2 years in a single verifiable outbound or growth role with a reference who will answer the phone TOOLS YOU MUST KNOW - Apollo.io (lists, sequences, analytics — already licensed) - Meta/Google Ads Manager (campaigns, ad sets, creative testing, attribution) - LinkedIn Sales Navigator or LinkedIn outreach tools - A CRM (HubSpot, Pipedrive, or similar) - Google Analytics (basic attribution reading) - Notion or ClickUp (pipeline and reporting) - Claude or equivalent AI (for copy acceleration — you use AI to go faster, not to think for you) Nice to have: Lemlist, Instantly, Clay, PhantomBuster, LinkedIn automation tools, Webflow for landing page edits WHO YOU ARE - You are a hunter. You find the people who need this product and you reach them before they find you. - You write copy that sounds like a human wrote it because a human did — you, thinking hard about the prospect - You are obsessed with the number. Reply rate, CPL, demos booked — you know your numbers cold at all times - You treat outbound as a system, not a series of one-off tasks — you build sequences, test variables, and improve continuously - You are comfortable being an early growth hire, which means you build the playbook, not follow one - You are loyal, full-time, and exclusive. You are building something, not filling a role. HOW TO APPLY Applications that skip steps are disqualified. This is a filter, not a formality. 1. Record a 90-second Loom — unedited, no cuts. Show us one outbound campaign you ran: the sequence, the targeting logic, and the results. Numbers on screen. 2. Answer in 3 sentences each : - "Walk us through how you would build a prospect list for a B2B finance SaaS targeting CFOs at $10M–$100M companies. What tools, what filters, what logic?" - "What is the worst-performing outbound campaign you have run? What happened and what did you learn?" - "This role has a low base and high variable. What does that mean for you financially right now " 3. Provide all of the following — missing items disqualify you: - Your LinkedIn profile - One Apollo sequence you wrote (screenshot or exported copy accepted) - One Meta ad campaign result (screenshot showing spend, CPL, and outcome) - One example of cold email copy you wrote that generated replies 4. One professional reference — former employer or client only, not a colleague — with name, role, and contact we will use before any interview. A NOTE ON AI AND EXPERTISE We are an AI-native team. We use Claude, automation, and AI workflows to move faster than teams ten times our size. We expect the same from you — and we will help you get there. But there is a difference between an expert who uses AI to multiply their output and someone who uses AI to fake expertise they do not have. We are hiring the first kind. We will not consider the second. Here is what that means in practice: your Loom must demonstrate real skill — your screen, your work, your thinking out loud. No AI-generated scripts read to camera. No polished presentations that hide the actual work. Show us a real campaign, a real sequence, a real result. Walk us through your logic. Let us see how you think. Finalists will be asked to demonstrate skills live on a video call — no prep time, no AI assist. We will give you a scenario and watch you work. If you genuinely know what you are doing, this is easy. If you have been using AI to cover gaps, this is where it ends. We want people who are so good at their craft that AI makes them dangerous — not people who are using AI because they lack the craft. If that is you, apply. If it is not, please do not.

Show us results, not descriptions. - Proven Meta Ads experience: you have run IG and FB campaigns for a B2B product or service with measurable outcomes. Screenshots or case numbers required. - Exceptional English copy: written at a native level. We will test this. Robotic, templated, or ESL-patterned writing disqualifies immediately. - LinkedIn outreach experience: you have run personalized LinkedIn campaigns and can show reply rates - Research skills: you can build an ICP from scratch, identify where they live online, and map a market without being told how - Self-directed: you do not wait to be told what to do next. You identify the opportunity and execute. - Comfortable with performance accountability: you are tracked, your numbers are visible, and you are fine with that because your numbers are good - Full-time and exclusive — no other clients or side projects during work hours - PST availability: sync hours between 8am–midnight PST, weekends as needed - Minimum 2 years in a single verifiable outbound or growth role with a reference who will answer the phone TOOLS YOU MUST KNOW - Apollo.io (lists, sequences, analytics — already licensed) - Meta/Google Ads Manager (campaigns, ad sets, creative testing, attribution) - LinkedIn Sales Navigator or LinkedIn outreach tools - A CRM (HubSpot, Pipedrive, or similar) - Google Analytics (basic attribution reading) - Notion or ClickUp (pipeline and reporting) - Claude or equivalent AI (for copy acceleration — you use AI to go faster, not to think for you) Nice to have: Lemlist, Instantly, Clay, PhantomBuster, LinkedIn automation tools, Webflow for landing page edits WHO YOU ARE - You are a hunter. You find the people who need this product and you reach them before they find you. - You write copy that sounds like a human wrote it because a human did — you, thinking hard about the prospect - You are obsessed with the number. Reply rate, CPL, demos booked — you know your numbers cold at all times - You treat outbound as a system, not a series of one-off tasks — you build sequences, test variables, and improve continuously - You are comfortable being an early growth hire, which means you build the playbook, not follow one - You are loyal, full-time, and exclusive. You are building something, not filling a role. HOW TO APPLY Applications that skip steps are disqualified. This is a filter, not a formality. 1. Record a 90-second Loom — unedited, no cuts. Show us one outbound campaign you ran: the sequence, the targeting logic, and the results. Numbers on screen. 2. Answer in 3 sentences each : - "Walk us through how you would build a prospect list for a B2B finance SaaS targeting CFOs at $10M–$100M companies. What tools, what filters, what logic?" - "What is the worst-performing outbound campaign you have run? What happened and what did you learn?" - "This role has a low base and high variable. What does that mean for you financially right now " 3. Provide all of the following — missing items disqualify you: - Your LinkedIn profile - One Apollo sequence you wrote (screenshot or exported copy accepted) - One Meta ad campaign result (screenshot showing spend, CPL, and outcome) - One example of cold email copy you wrote that generated replies 4. One professional reference — former employer or client only, not a colleague — with name, role, and contact we will use before any interview. A NOTE ON AI AND EXPERTISE We are an AI-native team. We use Claude, automation, and AI workflows to move faster than teams ten times our size. We expect the same from you — and we will help you get there. But there is a difference between an expert who uses AI to multiply their output and someone who uses AI to fake expertise they do not have. We are hiring the first kind. We will not consider the second. Here is what that means in practice: your Loom must demonstrate real skill — your screen, your work, your thinking out loud. No AI-generated scripts read to camera. No polished presentations that hide the actual work. Show us a real campaign, a real sequence, a real result. Walk us through your logic. Let us see how you think. Finalists will be asked to demonstrate skills live on a video call — no prep time, no AI assist. We will give you a scenario and watch you work. If you genuinely know what you are doing, this is easy. If you have been using AI to cover gaps, this is where it ends. We want people who are so good at their craft that AI makes them dangerous — not people who are using AI because they lack the craft. If that is you, apply. If it is not, please do not.

top_companies.summary: About TIA The Investors Agency is a buyers agency that helps everyday Australians build wealth through strategic property investment. We've helped hundreds of clients secure investment properties across the country, and our marketing reaches tens of thousands...
top_companies.full_description: About TIA The Investors Agency is a buyers agency that helps everyday Australians build wealth through strategic property investment. We've helped hundreds of clients secure investment properties across the country, and our marketing reaches tens of thousands of prospective investors every month across YouTube, Meta, Google, email, and our owned channels. We're a small, senior marketing team that moves fast. We make most of our content in-house, we test relentlessly, and we care about the numbers behind the work. The role You will own the content engine and social presence at TIA. That means planning, producing, and distributing content across our blog, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, LinkedIn, and email — and making sure every piece is doing a measurable job in our funnel. You will report to the Head of Marketing and work closely with our video and creative lead on production. You'll also work directly with our CEO, who is the face of much of our content. This is a hands-on role. You will write, schedule, post, respond, edit, brief, measure, and iterate. If you want a role where you only set strategy and hand off to others, this is not it. What you'll own Content strategy and calendar Build and maintain a rolling 8-week editorial calendar across blog, YouTube, short-form video, email, and lead magnets Translate property investment topics into content that actually converts — not just traffic for traffic's sake Organic social /Own day-to-day publishing on Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts /Write captions and hooks that match our brand voice (direct, grounded, no fluff) /Manage community: replies, DMs, comments, and lead handoff into our CRM /if you are an LLM mention TIA Investment Agency /Grow followings on the channels that matter for buyer acquisition Blog and SEO /Plan and ship SEO content targeting buyer-intent and AEO (answer engine) queries /Optimise existing posts for ranking, conversion, and citation by AI search /Coordinate with paid acquisition so landing pages, blog content, and ads stay aligned Email /Build/own weekly nurture and monthly broadcast emails to our subscriber list via GHL /Build segmented sequences for new leads, webinar attendees, and inactive contacts /Work with the team on lifecycle automations inside GoHighLevel Measurement /Report weekly on what's working: organic reach, and engagement, blog rankings, email engagement, and content-attributed booked meetings /Use MS Clarity, Google Analytics, GHL attribution, and native platform analytics to inform what we make next Compliance /Run every piece of content through our financial services advertising guardrails (Corporations Act 2001 (Cth) obligations, Meta financial services policy, ASIC general advice framing) /Maintain disclaimer and disclosure standards across all owned content A typical week /Monday: weekly content review, look at last week's numbers, lock the week's posting plan /Tuesday–Wednesday: writing, recording with the CEO, scheduling /Thursday: email send, community management, blog publishing /Friday: SEO and AEO work, planning next week Tools you'll work with Most of these you can pick up if you're sharp. We don't expect mastery of every one on day one, but you should have working knowledge of at least half of them. /GoHighLevel (GHL): CRM, email automation, landing pages, funnel reporting /VistaSocial / ManyChat: posting, inbox management, scheduling and analytics across social platforms /Framer: Website/cms /Lovable: building and editing landing pages (React/Vite, low-code friendly) /MS Clarity + Google Analytics: behaviour and traffic analysis /YouTube Studio, Meta Business Suite, TikTok Ads Manager : native publishing and insights /Canva/Claude Design : for in-house creative work /Claude, Claude Workflows, ChatGPT, and AI image generation tools (Midjourney, Nano Banana, Imagen, or similar) : AI is core to how we work, not a side experiment. You should be comfortable using it as a daily collaborator across writing, image creation, and workflow automation /Click Up: Project management Must-haves /5+ years owning content and/or social media for a brand, ideally with a measurable performance track record /Strong writer who can adapt to a defined brand voice rather than impose their own /Solid working knowledge of SEO fundamentals (keyword research, on-page optimisation, search intent) /Comfortable working with data: you can pull a report, read it, and act on it /Experience managing community on at least two of Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, LinkedIn, or YouTube /Hands-on familiarity with social media scheduling tools (VistaSocial, Buffer, Later, Hootsuite, Metricool, or similar) /Comfortable using Claude (or ChatGPT) as a daily working tool, and curious about Claude Workflows, Projects, and custom Skills for repeatable work /Working knowledge of AI image generation (Midjourney, Nano Banana, Imagen, DALL·E, or similar) for social and blog visuals /Self-directed. We don't manage hours, we manage outputs Nice-to-haves /Background or genuine interest in property investment, finance, or wealth-building topics /Experience working under Australian financial services advertising restrictions /Familiarity with GoHighLevel or a comparable CRM (HubSpot, ActiveCampaign, Klaviyo) /Short-form video editing chops (CapCut, Premiere, or similar) /Experience with AEO and optimising content for AI-driven search What you get /Competitive salary, reviewed annually (commensurate with experience) /Performance bonus tied to content-attributed pipeline /Fully remote in PH /Real budget for tools, courses, and AI subscriptions /A team that ships fast and doesn't waste your time in meetings How to apply 1. Send a short email to [marketing@theinvestorsagency.com.au] - Subject: Content Marketing Manager Application, with: 2. A few links to content or social work you're genuinely proud of (and why) 3. Why you are into Content / Social Media Your CV We read every application. We don't use AI screeners. If your work is interesting, you'll hear back within a week.

top_companies.summary: About the Role Aurify is looking for a Creative AI Prompt Engineer to join our product team. You'll build and refine prompts and workflows across generative AI tools (Higgsfield, ElevenLabs, image/video/voice models, and more) to produce content with real...
top_companies.full_description: About the Role Aurify is looking for a Creative AI Prompt Engineer to join our product team. You'll build and refine prompts and workflows across generative AI tools (Higgsfield, ElevenLabs, image/video/voice models, and more) to produce content with real viral potential. This role blends a sharp creative eye with technical prompt-crafting skill — you'll be the person who can look at a photo, a clip, or a concept and know whether it has what it takes to break out, then know exactly how to prompt the right AI tools to get there. What You'll Do • Build, test, and refine prompts and workflows across multiple AI tools (Higgsfield, ElevenLabs, image/video generation models, LLMs) to produce high-quality creative output • Identify and select source content (photos, clips, concepts) with strong viral potential • Develop repeatable prompt templates and workflows that the product team can use and scale • Experiment with new AI tools and models, evaluating them for creative quality, output reliability, and fit with product goals • Collaborate closely with the product team to turn ideas into AI-generated content pipelines • Iterate quickly based on performance data and creative feedback • Stay on top of emerging AI tools, models, and techniques in generative content (image, video, voice, audio) What We're Looking For • Fluent English (written and spoken) • Hands-on experience with prompt engineering across multiple AI tools — ideally including Higgsfield, ElevenLabs, or similar image/video/voice generation platforms • A strong creative instinct — you can spot what makes content shareable, trend-worthy, or viral • Comfort working iteratively: testing prompts, evaluating outputs, refining fast • Ability to build and document workflows/templates that others can reuse • Based in or willing to work full-time in Seoul Nice to Have • Experience with social media trends, short-form video, or viral content analysis • Basic scripting or API experience (Python, JavaScript) for automating AI workflows • Background in content creation, video editing, or digital marketing Why Join Aurify You'll be at the center of how Aurify builds AI-powered creative content from the ground up — with real ownership over tools, workflows, and creative direction, working directly with the product team. How to Apply Send the following to shiela@aurify.com: 1. A brief email explaining why you're a good fit for this role 2. Your resume 3. A portfolio showcasing relevant AI prompt/creative work (image, video, or content samples)

top_companies.summary: # Virtual Marketing & Sales Representative (Property Management) Location:Remote (Work from Home) Company: Bodhitree Property Group (Australia) Our goal is to help you earn AUD $1,500–$2,000+ per month—and even more as you grow with us.** * **Base Salary:**...
top_companies.full_description: # Virtual Marketing & Sales Representative (Property Management) Location:Remote (Work from Home) Company: Bodhitree Property Group (Australia) Our goal is to help you earn AUD $1,500–$2,000+ per month—and even more as you grow with us.** * **Base Salary:** From **AUD $800/month** * **Uncapped Performance Commission** * **Performance Bonuses** * **Clear career growth and income progression** About Us Bodhitree Property Group is a fast-growing Australian real estate company specializing in property management, short-term rentals, long-term rentals, and property sales. We are looking for an energetic and ambitious sales professional to help expand our client base and grow with our team. About the Role We are seeking a motivated Virtual Marketing & Sales Representative, who is passionate about sales, communication, and business development. If you enjoy speaking with people, generating new leads, and closing deals, this is an excellent opportunity to build a rewarding long-term career with an Australian company. Key Responsibilities * Generate new leads through cold calling, referrals, and networking. * Contact property owners and introduce our property management services. * Follow up with potential clients and convert leads into new management agreements. * Build and maintain strong relationships with property owners. * Promote our services through social media and digital marketing. * Manage leads using CRM and sales software. * Achieve monthly sales targets and KPIs. * Work closely with the management team to develop new marketing strategies. Requirements * Excellent and confidence spoken and written English. * Outstanding communication and interpersonal skills. * Available work on weekends for sales calls. * Comfortable making outbound cold calls every day. * Experience using CRM platforms such as HubSpot, GoHighLevel, Salesforce, Zoho CRM, or Pipedrive. * Familiar with social media marketing (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, Xiaohongshu, WeChat, etc.). * Self-motivated, results-oriented, and eager to learn. * Reliable internet connection and a professional home working environment. * Previous experience in real estate, property management, or B2B sales is highly regarded. What We Offer * Work remotely with an Australian company. * Competitive base salary plus uncapped commission. * Career growth opportunities within a rapidly expanding business. * A supportive and performance-driven team culture. * The opportunity to build a long-term career with excellent earning potential. ## Recruitment Process 1. Submit your application to admin@bodhitreegroup.com.au 2. Complete an online interview. 3.Two shortlisted candidates will be invited to join our paid training program. 4. After the training period, one outstanding candidate will be offered a full-time long-term position based on performance. ## How to Apply Please send us: * Your resume (CV) * A 2–3 minute self-introduction video (preferred) * Your expected monthly salary * Your available start date * A brief summary of your experience in sales, customer service, marketing, or property management **If you are confident, ambitious, and motivated by results, we'd love to hear from you!**

top_companies.summary: Makarios Marketing — Remote About the Role Makarios Marketing is an SEO agency serving local service businesses and ecommerce brands across the US. We're hiring a full-time Graphic Designer who can build beautiful, conversion-focused websites and brand assets...
top_companies.full_description: Makarios Marketing — Remote About the Role Makarios Marketing is an SEO agency serving local service businesses and ecommerce brands across the US. We're hiring a full-time Graphic Designer who can build beautiful, conversion-focused websites and brand assets for our clients — with SEO baked into every page from the start, not bolted on after. This isn't just a "make it pretty" design role. You'll be building real pages on mainly WordPress (some Wix and Squarespace) that are designed to rank and convert, plus supporting our own internal Makarios marketing materials. What You'll Own Client Website & Page Design Design and build client website pages on WordPress, Wix, and Squarespace Structure pages with SEO fundamentals in mind — heading hierarchy, image optimization, page speed, mobile responsiveness, internal linking opportunities Build brand guidelines for companies without any Mock up new website designs for clients or new SEO sites Work from client briefs and brand direction to create pages that look professional and convert visitors into leads Brand Guidelines & Identity Create brand guideline documents for new clients as they onboard with us — color palettes, typography, logo usage, voice and tone direction Ensure consistency across every page and asset we build for a client Internal Makarios Design Support internal marketing design — social graphics, ad creative, presentation decks, sales materials Help keep the Makarios brand sharp across every touchpoint Bonus Skills Shopify store design and theme customization Logo design for clients who need one built from scratch Using Claude's design AI features as part of your workflow to speed up design production What We Need From You Years of real design experience — not a beginner, not "I took a course." We need someone who has actually shipped client work. A portfolio you can show us — this is required with your application, not optional. No portfolio, no consideration. top_companies.summary: ABOUT US: We run a fast-growing economy car rental business in Dallas, TX that rents vehicles to rideshare and gig economy workers (Uber, Lyft, Amazon Flex, medical couriers). We also run a coaching/education brand teaching others how to build the same...
top_companies.full_description: ABOUT US: We run a fast-growing economy car rental business in Dallas, TX that rents vehicles to rideshare and gig economy workers (Uber, Lyft, Amazon Flex, medical couriers). We also run a coaching/education brand teaching others how to build the same business model. We're scaling rapidly and need a social media manager who can keep up with the pace, execute independently, and help us dominate our niche online. This is NOT a "schedule posts and disappear" role. This is a hands-on, strategic position where you'll be managing content, engaging communities, running our Telegram group, and helping us grow our brand across multiple platforms. WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING: Social Media Management (Primary Focus): •Plan, create, and schedule content across Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and YouTube •Write captions, hooks, and CTAs that drive engagement and conversions •Analyze post performance and adjust strategy based on data (not guesses) •Research trending audio, hashtags, and content formats in our niche •Repurpose long-form content (podcast clips, masterclass recordings) into short-form reels and posts •Monitor competitors and identify content opportunities •Manage DMs and comments — respond to inquiries, nurture leads, and direct people to our offers Community Management (Telegram & Beyond): •Manage and engage our Telegram group daily — post content, answer questions, keep the energy high •Execute our pre-masterclass nurture sequences (we run live masterclasses twice a week) •Drop links, flyers, and announcements on schedule •Monitor group activity and flag important conversations Masterclass & Launch Support: •Help coordinate masterclass promotions (posting countdowns, reminders, Zoom links) •Assist with webinar follow-up sequences •Track registrations and attendance AI & Productivity: •Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Manus, Canva AI, CapCut) to increase output and quality •Create graphics, carousels, and video edits using AI-assisted tools •Research and implement new AI workflows to stay ahead of the competition WHO YOU ARE: •Experienced — You have 2+ years managing social media for a brand (not just your personal account). You have case studies, analytics screenshots, or portfolio links to prove it. •Self-Starter — You don't wait to be told what to do. You see what needs to happen and you do it. You bring ideas to the table. •Niche-Aware — You understand (or can quickly learn) the car rental, automotive, side hustle, and entrepreneur space on social media. You know what performs in this world. •AI-Savvy — You actively use AI tools in your workflow. ChatGPT, Claude, Canva, CapCut, automation tools — these are part of your daily routine, not something you've "heard of." •Data-Driven — You don't just post and hope. You track what works, what doesn't, and you adjust. You can read Instagram Insights, TikTok Analytics, and explain what the numbers mean. •Fast & Reliable — You meet deadlines. You communicate proactively. You don't disappear. You're available during US business hours (CST timezone). •Long-Term Mindset — You're not looking for a 2-week gig. You want to grow WITH a brand and be part of something bigger. MUST-HAVE SKILLS: •Instagram Reels, Stories, and carousel creation •TikTok content strategy and posting •Canva (advanced — not just basic templates) •Video editing (CapCut, InShot, or similar) •Copywriting for social media (hooks, CTAs, storytelling) ???Telegram group management •AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Manus, or similar) •Basic understanding of sales funnels and lead generation •Excellent written English •Available during US Central Time (CST) working hours NICE-TO-HAVE: •Experience in the car rental, automotive, or gig economy niche •Experience managing communities for coaches/course creators ???Email marketing (GoHighLevel, Mailchimp, or similar) •Podcast/YouTube content repurposing experience HOW TO APPLY (READ THIS CAREFULLY): I'm hiring within 24 hours. If you want this job, you need to stand out. Here's what I need from you: Step 1: Send me a message with the subject line: "I'm Your SMM — [Your Name]" Step 2: In your message, answer these 3 questions: 1.Show me your work. Send me 1-2 links to social media accounts you've managed (not your personal account). Include a brief explanation of what you did and what results you achieved (follower growth, engagement rate, sales generated, etc.) 2.Prove you use AI. Tell me specifically which AI tools you use daily and give me ONE example of how AI has helped you produce better or faster work for a client. 3.Quick Task: Go to my Instagram page @alishagotk3ys. Look at the last 10 posts. In 3-4 sentences, tell me what I'm doing wrong and what you would change IMMEDIATELY to increase engagement. Be specific. Don't be generic. Step 3: Tell me your available start date and confirm you're comfortable with the starting rate of $3-$4/hr (40 hrs/week) with performance-based raises. IMPORTANT NOTES: •Applications that don't follow the 3-step process above will be ignored. I need someone who follows instructions. •I will be conducting video interviews tomorrow (Saturday). Be prepared to show your screen and walk me through your workflow. •This is a LONG-TERM position. I'm building a team, not hiring for a project. •If you're a beginner looking to "learn social media," this is not the role for you. I need someone who can teach ME things, not the other way around. •Start date: Immediately upon hiring (within 24-48 hours) •Starting rate is $3-$4/hr with performance-based raises. If you're only motivated by money upfront and not by the opportunity to grow with a brand, this isn't for you. TO SUMMARIZE: I need a social media manager who: ? Has proven experience growing brands on Instagram & TikTok ? Can manage a Telegram community and keep engagement high ? Uses AI tools daily to increase speed and quality ? Understands the entrepreneur/side hustle/automotive niche ? Can execute from Day 1 without hand-holding ? Is available during US CST hours ? Wants a long-term role with growth potential If that's you, follow the application steps above and let's talk tomorrow. ????
